ref: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
text: T…Ē: ka Naawunni n zaŇčŇči tirima ni yarima gba n‚ÄĎzaali deede n‚ÄĎti Kirisita; Ňč…Ēna n daa diisi ti naam gba,

ref: and put his Spirit in our hearts to show that we belong only to him.
text: ka laa n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči u daalimni m‚ÄĎpa ti; ka ky…õ ka u Sii la b…õ ti sufu ni, ni di ti wulisi, ni, di zaaniya ka di siri ya ky…õ na.

ref: We are not bosses who tell you what to believe. We are working with you to make you glad, because your faith is strong.
text: Pa la ti su la ya y…õdda y…õla m‚ÄĎmugsira, amaa tin ni yarima la'amni n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇčni la taaba ya sufumaasim zugu; dama y…õdda zugu ka ya z…õ deede maa.

ref: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
text: Dinzugu n daa teesi n‚ÄĎgbaai n sufu ni, ni, n bu ya ky…õ ya saani na n‚ÄĎlaa n‚ÄĎnya sufusa'aŇčŇču yaasa.

ref: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
text: Dama man yi ti sa'am ya sufu, Ňč…Ēni m b…õ ni n‚ÄĎya ky…õ ka man mun sufu maai? - ka di pa la man sa'am seeba sufu maa, di ny…õ la yarima.

ref: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
text: N daa s…Ēbi lala maa, ni n ti ky…õ ka man yi ky…õ ya saani na maa, ya ku sa'am n sufu maa; dama yarima n ny…õ ban sum ni ya ky…õ ka n sufu maai. Ay! - n siri daa mari y…õdda, ni, ya zaa nin la'am n‚ÄĎnya n sufumaasim maa.

ref: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
text: Dama sufusa'aŇčŇču ni beerim ni nintam zugu n daa ky…õ ka n s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎti ya maa. Ka di pa la ni n ky…õ ka ya sufu ti sa'am, amaa ni ya ti baŇčŇči man wuri ya pam seem.

ref: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
text: Ninvugs…Ē Ňč…Ēn daa taasi sufusa'aŇčŇču na maa, pa man sufu ka u daa sa'am amaa ya zaa sufu - bee, n t…Ē'asiri lala n‚ÄĎyakkri s…ĒsuŇčŇču?

ref: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
text: Ya daadam b…Ēbgu Ňč…Ēn pun darigi u tubri seem la - t…Ē di sakkiya!

ref: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
text: Dinzugu ya ky…õri u taalli m‚ÄĎp…õŇčŇči u, ka suŇčŇči u ka u ti nya sufumaasim: di yi pa lala, di pa seem sufusa'aŇčŇču nin nyaŇčŇči u.

ref: You should make them sure of your love for them.
text: Di zugu n kpamsiri ya ni, ni, ya kur ky…õ ka u baŇčŇči, ni, ya wuri u ni.

ref: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
text: Halli din daa ky…õ ka n daa s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎti ya daa ny…õ la: ni, n ti zamsi ya y…õdda y…õla, m‚ÄĎbaŇčŇči ya nin deaai n noori seelikam puuni deede, bee, ya bu ya deaai?

ref: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
text: Ya yi pun ky…õ s…Ē taalli m‚ÄĎp…õŇčŇči u, man gba ky…õ di daama taalli m‚ÄĎp…õŇčŇči u: man mun daa ky…õ taaliseaa m‚ÄĎp…õŇčŇči u la - taalli yi siri daa b…õ ni - n daa ky…õ m‚ÄĎp…õŇčŇči yarima zugu, Kirisita Masiiya tooni.

ref: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
text: Ka di nin ky…õ ka Sintaani ku nyaŇčŇči ti. Dama ti pa la seeba ban zi u teesibeeri y…õla an ny…õ seem la.

ref: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
text: T…Ē, man Ňč…Ēn daa kyaŇčŇči Tir…Ē'asi tiŇčŇča, ni n ti mooli Kirisita lahabasuŇčŇču y…õla maa, n daa nya ka ti Dugma pun yoaai soori n‚ÄĎti ma.

ref: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
text: Amaa n daa na kpalim n‚ÄĎka sufudoaa dama n daa bu nya m mabii Taituusi la b…õni. Lala zugu ka n daa kyeoosi ba ka gaari n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči Masidoonya.

ref: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
text: Amaa ti puusiri Naawunni dama u suŇčŇčni ti sahakam. Ka Kirisita Ňč…Ēn nyaŇčŇči zaa ka ky…õnni u gyirima gyingaari ni ky…õnni sahanseaa la, Ňč…Ēn Naawunni n ky…õ ka ti d…Ēli la Kirisita nyaaŇčŇča. Halli u ky…õ ka tirima zugu ka ba baŇčŇči u bamsim maa seela zaa, hoo nyunya'asiri Ňč…Ēn kpeeri yiri ya'akam zaa puuni la ka niriba zaa wumna.

ref: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
text: Tirim bu Ňčmanni daa biisi, ti bu zaŇčŇči Naawunni y…õligu n‚ÄĎdiri daa n‚ÄĎkoosiri m‚ÄĎboori ligri di zugu. Ay - ti t…Ē'asiri y…õdda ni y…õlimaŇčni y…õla: ti t…Ē'asiri hoo Naawunni Ňč…Ēn tum seeba la, ka di ny…õ la Ňč…Ēn Naawunni ni Kirisita tooni ka ti t…Ē'asira.

ref: Are we once again bragging about ourselves? Do we need letters to you or from you to tell others about us? Some people do need letters telling about them.
text: Ammi, dinŇč…Ē wulisi la, ni, ti maali n‚ÄĎtibgri ti mansi, bee? Ti ny…õ la seeba ban boori ni ba s…Ēbi gbana n‚ÄĎky…õ ka ya baŇčŇči ti, fa? Bee, ya s…Ēbri lala gbana n‚ÄĎti ti gba? - hoo seeba Ňč…Ēn boori a seem la.

ref: But you are our letter, and you are in our hearts for everyone to read and understand.
text: Ay! Ti gbana maa n siri ny…õ yarima: ban s…Ēbi gbanseesi n‚ÄĎniŇči ti sufu ni n ny…õ ya. S…Ēkam nin toaai n‚ÄĎkarim ti lala gbana maa m‚ÄĎbaŇčŇči a gbinni Ňč…Ēn ny…õ seem.

ref: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
text: Di kasigi n‚ÄĎwulisi, ni, Yisa Kirisita mammaŇčŇča n s…Ēbi lala gbaŇčŇču maa, di ny…õ la yarima; ka tirima muna - ba tum ti ni ti mari ka na. Ba bu zaŇčŇči inki n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi ka, amaa Naawunni Ny…Ēvuri Daana Sii Kasi la ka ba zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎs…Ēbra. Halli ba bu boaai n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi ka kuglama ni, hoo Musa zaaligu Ňč…Ēn daa s…Ēbi seem la, amaa ninsaalidima sufu ni.

ref: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
text: Ti y…õtti dinŇč…Ē, dama ti niŇči y…õdda ka bu birisiri Naawunni tooni, ka di b…õ la Kirisita zugu.

ref: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
text: Seelli ka ti ni din nin wulisi, ni, tirim mammaŇčŇča nin toaai n‚ÄĎtumni tuma maa. Din ky…õ ka ti nin toaai n‚ÄĎtumni a maa yi la Naawunni saani na.

ref: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
text: Ňä…Ēn Naawunni n ky…õ ka ti sa'ai ni ti tum u nangbanyinni zaaligu s…Ēpaalli tuma wa. Ka ka pa la s…Ēseaa kan d…Ēli s…Ēppu la, amaa Sii maa soori n ny…õ ka. S…Ēppu zaaligu soori mari la kum, amaa Sii maa soori tisiri la ny…Ēvuri.

ref: The Law of Moses brought only the promise of death, even though it was carved on stones and given in a wonderful way. Still the Law made Moses' face shine so brightly the people of Israel could not look at it, even though it was a fading glory.
text: T…Ē; amaa zaalikurigu la muna - ba daa boaai ka n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi n‚ÄĎniŇči kuga ni, ka ka daa mari kum na; amaa ka tuma soori daa mari gyirima pam. Halli di daa ky…õ ka Musa nindaa la daa nya'ari nyain, ka Izra…õli dima daa bu nyaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎg…Ēsira. U nindaa neesim daa baligri ni; amaa di zaa y…Ēri, gyirima n‚ÄĎdaa siri la.

ref: So won't the agreement the Spirit brings to us be even more wonderful?
text: Ka di yi b…õ lala, gyirima pam nin ti d…Ēli Sii maa zaaligu soori tuma, halli nti yakki: bee, m ma'ai ni?

ref: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
text: S…Ēkurigu gyirima bu laa n‚ÄĎŇčmani la gyirimamaŇčni, dama s…Ēpaalli gyirima gaari ka halli nti yakki.

ref: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
text: DaŇčŇčni soori neesim daa baligri m‚ÄĎbasira, halli ka di daa piili ni gyirima; dizugu s…Ēseaa kan kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ gyirima ni ka bu naari la mari la gyirima n‚ÄĎgaari ka.

ref: This wonderful hope makes us feel like speaking freely.
text: Lala zugu tin mari tama kanŇč…Ē maa zugu, ti gbaari ti mansi n‚ÄĎtumna, ka vi ka ni.

ref: We are not like Moses. His face was shining, but he covered it to keep the people of Israel from seeing the brightness fade away.
text: Tirima bu Ňčmani la hoo Musa, dama Ňč…Ēna n daa zaŇčŇči saariga n‚ÄĎligi u nindaa, ni Izra…õli niriba di ti nya gyirima neesim la Ňč…Ēn daa baligri n‚ÄĎnaari seem maa.

ref: The people were stubborn, and something still keeps them from seeing the truth when the Law is read. Only Christ can take away the covering that keeps them from seeing.
text: Amaa di zaa y…Ēri, Izra…õli dima maa y…õm na kpalim n‚ÄĎligi ni; ba yi kur karimni gbankurigu la, saariga maa na kpalim m‚ÄĎpili la ba y…õm. Ka bu piligi m‚ÄĎbasi, dama Yisa k…Ēk…Ē n ny…õ ka piligra.

ref: When the Law of Moses is read, they have their minds covered over
text: Halli ni zuna, ba yi ti karimni Musa zaaligu gbaŇčŇču la, saariga maa na kpalim m‚ÄĎpili la ba y…õm.

ref: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
text: T…Ē: ti Dugma n ny…õ Sii maa, ka ti Dugma Sii yi b…õ seelli zaa, b…õni ka sumaŇčŇča nin b…õ ni.

ref: God has been kind enough to trust us with this work. This is why we never give up.
text: Ka di ny…õ la Naawunni namboo zugu ka ti tumni wa, ti ku toaai n‚ÄĎky…õ tama.

ref: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
text: Ay! - di pa lala. Ti za'asi y…õlis…Ē'ara seesi m mari vi la, ka bu goori n‚ÄĎy…Ēmsira, ti mun bu sa'amni Naawunni y…õligu la. Amaa tin y…õtti y…õlimaŇčni maa paalu ni maa zugu ky…õ ka s…Ēkam baŇčŇči ti y…õla suŇčŇča u sufu teesa ni, zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkpa Naawunni saani.

ref: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
text: Halli ni ti lahabasuŇčŇču maa Ňč…Ēn ligi la saariga seeba saani maa zaa y…Ēri, ban baasiri y…Ēri la saani ka ka ligi.

ref: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
text: Dama Sintaani n ky…õ ka duniya wa dima nya u n‚ÄĎgyeemni u, ni, ba Naawunni. U siri ky…õ ka ban ka y…õdda la sufu zoomna, ka bu nyari neesimaŇčni: lala neesim maa mun yi la lahabasuŇčŇču mooligu ni na - lahabaari zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči Kirisita gyirima, ka Ňč…Ēn Kirisita mun Ňčmani la Naawunni deede.

ref: We are not preaching about ourselves. Our message is that Jesus Christ is Lord. He also sent us to be your servants.
text: Pa ti mammansi y…õla ka ti moonna, amaa Yisa Kirisita Masiiya y…õla, ni, u ny…õ la ti Dugma: ka laa m‚ÄĎmoonni, ni, tirima n ny…õ ban gyeemni ya zaa, Ňč…Ēn Yisa zugu.

ref: The Scriptures say, ‚ÄúGod commanded light to shine in the dark.‚ÄĚ Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
text: Naawunni daa y…õli, ni, ‚ÄúKy…õ ka neesim neaai zibsim ni!‚ÄĚ: t…Ē, Ňč…Ēn Naawunni ky…õ ka u neesim neaai ti sufu ni gba, ni di ti ti ti bamsim zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči Naawunni gyirima din b…õ Yisa Kirisita nindaa ni la.

ref: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
text: Di mugsi ti ya'ari kam, amaa ti bu Ňčmirigi. Ti burimna, amaa ka bu basi tama.

ref: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
text: Ba niŇčni ti putoo, amaa ti bu basi y…Ēri; ba Ňčm…õ ti n‚ÄĎlusi, amaa ti bu sa'am zaa.

ref: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
text: Ii - tirima ban n…õ wa, ba kur zaŇčŇčni ti n‚ÄĎniŇčni kum ziiya, Yisa y…õla zugu; dama lala nin ky…õ ka Ňč…Ēn Yisa ny…Ēvuri beesigu ti yi paalu, halli ti ningbina an kpiiri la puuni gba.

ref: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
text: T…Ē, ka dizugu kum tumni ti puuni, amaa yarima muna - ny…Ēvuri tumni ya puuni.

ref: In the Scriptures it says, ‚ÄúI spoke because I had faith.‚ÄĚ We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
text: Di s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎdooli, ni, ‚ÄúN daa niŇči y…õdda; dizugu ka n daa t…Ē'asi.‚ÄĚ T…Ē, ka tirima gba niŇči y…õdda, ka lala zugu ka ti t…Ē'asira.

ref: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
text: Dama ti mi halli, ni, Naawunni daa neaai ti Dugma Yisa kum ni. Ka laa m‚ÄĎmi, ni, Ňč…Ēna n ny…õ s…Ē Ňč…Ēn nin ky…õ ka ti gba neaai, tin ni Yisa Ňč…Ēn la'am m‚ÄĎb…õ ni maa, ka nin taasi tin ni yarima zaa m‚ÄĎpaai u saani na.

ref: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
text: AnŇč…Ē zaa ny…õ la yarima anfaani zugu; di gbinni ny…õ la: ni, niriba pam Ňč…Ēn deaari Naawunni piinisuma an zoaai nti yakki la, ba nin puusi Naawunni pampam di zugu, ka Naawunni gyirima ti paasira.

ref: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna ti ku basi tama. Halli ni ti ningbina d…ĒŇčŇčni maa zaa y…Ēri, ti mun sufu ni ti maanni n‚ÄĎleebri bumpaala beoo kam.

ref: These little troubles are getting us ready for an eternal glory that will make all our troubles seem like nothing.
text: Y…õlimugsa mari ti, amaa a bu tibsa ka a mun ku yuui. Ka anŇč…Ē zaa nin ky…õ ka ti nya tibsim ni gyirima an gaari zaa ka laa n‚ÄĎka naari.

ref: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
text: Ti siri bu zaŇčŇči ti nini n‚ÄĎkpa la bunseesi an nyari la, amaa an bu nyari maa ka ti g…Ēsira. Dama bunseesi an nyari ni nini bu ya n‚ÄĎyuui, amaa an bu nyari muna - anŇč…Ē nin ti kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ ni sahakam.

ref: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
text: T…Ē: ka ti baŇčŇči ti duniya wa ningbina y…õla: ni, a Ňčmani la hoo suga, bee, tanti leensi; ni, a yi ti wurim m‚ÄĎbasi, s…Ēkam mari u dusuŇčŇču, Naawunni Ňč…Ēn m…õ seaa n‚ÄĎti ti, pa ninsaala; ka lala duu maa z…õ la arizana ni, ka ka nin ti yuui halli saha kan ka naari.

ref: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
text: Tin Ňč…Ēn kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ kpa wa, ti na nyuusiri ni, dama ti sufu kur boori la ti paai dupaala wa n‚ÄĎkp…õ a ni, bee, ti nya suturipaala Naawunni saani n‚ÄĎy…õ a.

ref: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
text: Ya bu nya? - ti yi nya sutura n‚ÄĎy…õa, dinŇč…Ē wulisiri, ni, ti ku laa n‚ÄĎky…õnni y…Ēri.

ref: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
text: Tin mun na kpalim n‚ÄĎgbeeri kpa wa sugri la ni, ti kur nyuusiri ni ka fabinna; di pa la tin boori la ni ti ky…õnni y…Ēri, amaa tin boori ni ti y…õ suturiveela, bee, n‚ÄĎkp…õ ti duseesi an z…õ arizana ni la. Di saha ka ti bunseesi an kpiiri la nin ti basi zaa, ka ny…Ēvuri nin nyaŇčŇči a zaa.

ref: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
text: Halli lala zugu ka Naawunni daa naam ti m‚ÄĎmaali ti siri; ka u wulisi ti lala, dama u pun daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči u Siiya n‚ÄĎti ti.

ref: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
text: T…Ē: ka dinŇč…Ēna ti kpamsiri ti sufu, dama ti mi halli, ni, ti yi na kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ ningbina wa puuni, di wulisi, ni, ti na ka Naawunni saani.

ref: But we live by faith, not by what we see.
text: PampaŇčŇč…Ē saha ti mari y…õdda n‚ÄĎky…õnna: pa ti nini ka ti mari n‚ÄĎnyari deede.

ref: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
text: Ii, ti siri kpamsiri ti sufu: tin Ňč…Ēn mun boori ni ti yi ningbina wa ni, ni ti ti b…õ Naawunni saani.

ref: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
text: Ka dinzugu ti kpaŇčŇči ti mansi n‚ÄĎtumni din ky…õ ka Ňč…Ēn Naawunni nini tigra, halli tin b…õ duniya wa ningbina puuni maa, bee, ti ka a ni.

ref: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna ti mi Naawunni y…õla Ňč…Ēn mari dabeem seem: lala zugu ka ti kpaŇčŇčni ti maŇčŇča ni ti moonni Naawunni lahabaari n‚ÄĎky…õ ka niriba ti sakki. Ti beebu bu s…Ē'ai Naawunni saani, ka ti laa m‚ÄĎmari tama, ni, di bu s…Ē'ai ya gba sufu teesa saani.

ref: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
text: Di pa la ti maali m‚ÄĎboori ti tibgi ti maŇčŇča ya saani yaasa; ay! - ti ya n‚ÄĎti ya la soori ni ya ti nyuuri bara ti y…õla zugu. Ka dinŇč…Ēna, ninvugseeba yi ya nyu bara zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči bunseesi an nyari wa y…õla, ka pa sufu ni y…õlimaŇčni y…õla, ni ba ti zeem ya - t…Ē! yan mun nin nyaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎlabsi ba labsisuŇčŇču.

ref: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
text: Ni, yinyaari mari ti - t…Ē, di yi b…õ la lala, di ny…õ la Naawunni zugu ka ti k…ĒŇčŇči y…õm. Tin mun yi ny…õ ninvugmaŇča, di ny…õ la yarima zugu ka ti mari ninneesim.

ref: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
text: Yisa Kirisita Masiiya wurilim b…õ ni m‚ÄĎmugsiri ti: ti ku toaai n‚ÄĎy…õli seela, na'ala, ninvugyinni Ňč…Ēn daa kpi n‚ÄĎti s…Ēkam la zugu, lala wulisi, ni, s…Ēkam mun kpiya.

ref: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
text: Ka Ňč…Ēn daa kpi maa gbinni ny…õ la: ni, ban kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ ni la, pa ba mammaŇčŇča zugu ka ba b…õ ni, amaa Ňč…Ēn Kirisita zugu ka ba b…õ ni, dama u daa kpi n‚ÄĎti ba ka laa n‚ÄĎyisigi.

ref: We are careful not to judge people by what they seem to be, though we once judged Christ in this way.
text: Ka di zugu pampaŇčŇč…Ē zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎky…õnna ti ku laa n‚ÄĎg…Ēsiri niriba hoo duniya wa ninsaadima maa Ňč…Ēn g…Ēsiri ba seem m‚ÄĎbugsiri ba y…õla: halli ti yi daa g…Ēsiri Kirisita mammaŇčŇča g…Ēsibu wa, ti ku laa n‚ÄĎniŇči lala.

ref: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
text: DinŇč…Ēna ninvugs…Ē yi b…õ Kirisita saani, ba naam u la bumpaalli: u beesikurigu la gaariya, ka bunseelikam leebi la beesipaalli.

ref: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
text: Ka anŇč…Ē zaa yi la Naawunni saani. U daa ky…õ ka Kirisita z…Ē ti sindaani u saani m‚ÄĎmaali y…õtt…Ē'a zaa, ka daa laa n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči sindaani zoobu tuma wa n‚ÄĎti ti ni ti ti tumna.

ref: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
text: Ni, Ňč…Ēn Naawunni daa b…õ la Kirisita saani n‚ÄĎz…Ēri sindaani, ni u ti maali u y…õtt…Ē'a zaa n‚ÄĎti duniya wa dima, ni u ku laa n‚ÄĎteesi ba tumbeeri y…õla halli beela. Ka u zaŇčŇči sindaani zoobu wa y…õla n‚ÄĎti ti ni ti ti moonna.

ref: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
text: Dama Naawunni tum ma, hoo Ňč…Ēn tum bis…Ē ni u ti mari Ňč…Ēn Naawunni kuk…Ēri n‚ÄĎky…õ na n‚ÄĎsusira. Lala ka u tum ti zaa gba. Ti susiri niriba nimmoosi Kirisita zugu, ni, ba labi Naawunni saani na n‚ÄĎniŇči nangbanyinni.

ref: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
text: Naawunni tuntuntaaba n ny…õ ti, ka Naawunni pun zaŇčŇči u piini n‚ÄĎti ti, halli ka ti bu sumsi lala; t…Ē, ka di zugu ti kpamsiri ya, ni, yan di ky…õ ka Naawunni piini wa basi y…Ēri.

ref: In the Scriptures God says, ‚ÄúWhen the time came, I listened to you, and when you needed help, I came to save you.‚ÄĚ That time has come. This is the day for you to be saved.
text: Dama u y…õliya, ni#:- ‚ÄúSahasuŇčŇču maa deede ka n daa wum n‚ÄĎti ya, Halli tuliginsim dabsiri daari ka n daa suŇčŇči ya.‚ÄĚ ka mani n y…õtti ya wa, ni, pampaŇčŇč…Ē n ny…õ Naawunni ‚ÄėsahasuŇčŇču‚Äô wa, ka ‚Äėtuliginsim daari‚Äô wa n ny…õ zuna.

ref: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
text: Ti bu ta'ari s…Ē soori, ka lala nin ky…õ ka ba ku galim ti tuma soori wa.

ref: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
text: Amaa bunseelikam zaa puuni ti ya n‚ÄĎwulisiri, ni, Naawunni tuntumniba n ny…õ ti. Halli di yi ny…õ wahala diibu puuni gba, ti b…õ la lala n‚ÄĎdiri sugru, ni toom ni y…õlimugsa puuni gba.

ref: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
text: Ba bu ti, ka kpari ti sarika duri ni; niriba mun daa zabri ti y…õla zugu; ti daa tumni tunkpeema, ka ganni g…Ēgala, ka kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ k…Ēm ni. A zaa puuni ka ti tumni la Naawunni tuma.

ref: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
text: Ti kur z…õ yummu Naawunni saani, m‚ÄĎmari y…õm, ni sugru, ni nirilim; ti kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ Naawunni Vuusim Kasi saani, ka wuri niriba ni y…õlimaŇčni.

ref: We have spoken the truth, and God's power has worked in us. In all our struggles we have said and done only what is right.
text: Ti mari la y…õlimaŇčni y…õligu n‚ÄĎtumna, ni Naawunni yiiko; ti mari ti t…Ēppu neema an ny…õ la y…õlimaŇčni dina, ka a b…õ la ti nudirigu ni ti nuzaa ni zaa.

ref: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
text: AnŇč…Ē zaa puuni ka ba p…õ'ari ti, ka laa n‚ÄĎfiilim ti; ba gyeemni ti ka laa n‚ÄĎzeemni ti; ba y…õtti, ni, ti y…Ēmsira, ka laa n‚ÄĎy…õtti, ni, ti t…Ē'asiri y…õlimaŇčni.

ref: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
text: S…Ēs…Ē bu mi ti y…õla, amaa ti yuuri duya; ti ny…õ la hoo ban kpiira, ka kpalim n‚ÄĎn…õa; ba namsiri ti, amaa ti bu kpi zaa.

ref: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
text: Halli ti b…õ la sufusa'aŇčŇču ni, amaa ka mari sufupeelli sahakam; ti b…õ la fara ni, amaa ka ky…õ ka daadam pam leebi la bundaandima; ti ka seela, amaa ka mari bunseelikam.

ref: Friends in Corinth, we are telling the truth when we say there is room in our hearts for you.
text: Ya bu nya, ti z…Ēdima? - ti t…Ē'asi n‚ÄĎti ya K…Ērinti dima wa ka bu m…ĒŇčŇči ya, halli ti yoaai la ti sufu ni teesa n‚ÄĎti ya.

ref: We are not holding back on our love for you, but you are holding back on your love for us.
text: Di pa la ni tirima n m…ĒŇčŇčni ya ti wurilim; ay! - amaa yarima n m…ĒŇčŇčni ti ya wurilim.

ref: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
text: DinŇč…Ēna see ka ya d…Ēli soori n‚ÄĎlabsi n‚ÄĎti ma hoo man pun tisi seem - n t…Ē'asiri n‚ÄĎtiri ya hoo m biisi la - ka ya gba yoaai ya sufu ni teesa n‚ÄĎti ma.

ref: Stay away from people who are not followers of the Lord! Can someone who is good get along with someone who is evil? Are light and darkness the same?
text: Yan di ky…õ ka yan ni ban ka y…õdda la ti la'amni n‚ÄĎtumni hoo na'akoora Ňč…Ēn tumni seem. Ammi, y…õlimaŇčni ni tuppuwumni la'amni n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇčni taaba? - Ay! Bee, neesim ni zibsim ya niŇči la wula n‚ÄĎla'amna? - a ku toaai, halli beela!

ref: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
text: Kirisita siri ku toaai n‚ÄĎl…Ē nangbanyinni ni Sintaani; bee, y…õdda daana ku toaai n‚ÄĎny…õ Ňč…Ēn za'asi y…õdda niŇčbu la taraana.

ref: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, ‚ÄúI will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.‚ÄĚ
text: Naawunni GyeeŇčŇču Yiri siri bu Ňčmanni ba'ari bee bugri Ňč…Ēn b…õ seela. Amaa tirima n ny…õ gyeeŇčŇču yiri n‚ÄĎti Naawunni Ny…Ēvuri Daana maa. Hoo Ňč…Ēn Naawunni daa y…õliya#:- ‚ÄúN nin kp…õ ba saani n‚ÄĎgb…õa; Man ni ban nin ky…õnni n‚ÄĎgyinna; N nin ny…õ Naawunni n‚ÄĎti ba Ka ba mun nin ny…õ n niriba.‚ÄĚ

ref: The Lord also says, ‚ÄúLeave them and stay away! Don't touch anything that isn't clean. Then I will welcome you
text: Dinzugu, ni#:- ‚Äú ‚ÄėYa yim na ka ky…õ ba, n‚ÄĎw…Ēligi ya mansi m‚ÄĎb…õ ya k…Ēk…Ēa.‚Äô - Lala ka ti Dugma y…õtta.‚ÄĚ Ni#:- ‚ÄúYa di siisi bunda'ariga kan kyisira, Ka n nin deaai ya.

ref: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.‚ÄĚ
text: Ka n nin leebi ya Ba, Ka yan mun nin leebi m biisi. - Lala ka ti Dugma Yiiko Zaa Daana y…õtta.‚ÄĚ

ref: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
text: T…Ē, m mabiwutta, ba pun basi nangbambasiri wa n‚ÄĎti ti na, ka di zugu ya ky…õ ka ti leebi Naawunni niriba kasikasi. Ka ky…õ ka da'ari ka ti ni, ti ningbina ni ti siisi zaa; ka laa n‚ÄĎz…Ēri Naawunni, ni u ti su ti beesigu y…õla zaa.

ref: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
text: Ya ku deaai ti suŇčŇča? Ti bu tum s…Ē taalli, ti bu sa'am s…Ē soori, ti mun bu y…Ēmsi s…Ē n‚ÄĎfa u.

ref: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
text: Man Ňč…Ēn y…õtti lala, di pa la ni n ya n‚ÄĎwulisi, ni, ya pa la niriba: ya siri b…õ la ti sufu ni, halli ni tin ni yan yi la'am n‚ÄĎkpi, bee, ti la'am n‚ÄĎn…õ gba - ti pun y…õli ya lala - bee, ti daa bu y…õli?

ref: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
text: N siri niŇči ya y…õdda ka t…Ē'asiri pam n‚ÄĎnyuuri bara ya zugu. N nya n sufu maasim zaa di zugu; ni ti wahala diibu zaa y…Ēri, n sufu p…õligiya pam.

ref: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
text: Dama tin daa paai Masidoonya sahanseaa maa, ti daa bu nya vuusim, ka daa nyari y…õla pam ya'ari kam zaa. Daadam saani ka ti daa mari zaba, ka ti sufu puuni ka dabeem daa kur b…õ ni.

ref: But God cheers up people in need, and this is what he did when he sent Titus to us.
text: Amaa ni di zaa y…Ēri, Naawunni n ny…õ s…Ē Ňč…Ēn g…Ēsiri ban ka yaa y…õla n‚ÄĎtiri ba maasim, ka u daa maai ti sufu, ka ky…õ ka Taituusi ky…õ ti saani na.

ref: Of course, we were glad to see Titus, but what really made us glad is the way you cheered him up. He told how sorry you were and how concerned you were about me. And this made me even happier.
text: Ka di pa la u ky…õnni na maa k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa yan ni Ňč…Ēna Ňč…Ēn daa mari sufumaasim ni taaba seem la zugu. U daa y…õtti yan boori ti y…õla seem la, ni yan nyari sufusa'aŇčŇču seem, taalli maa zugu; m‚ÄĎpaasi yan zaŇčŇči ya sufu zaa n‚ÄĎniŇčni na: ka lala daa ky…õ ka n sufu maai halli nti yakki.

ref: I don't feel bad anymore, even though my letter hurt your feelings. I did feel bad at first, but I don't now. I know that the letter hurt you for a while.
text: Ni man daa s…Ēbi gbaŇčŇču ka ya sufu sa'am maa zaa, m bu ya takki n‚ÄĎlabi nyaaŇčŇča. Halli n siri daa boori ni n takki, dama n daa nya ka gbaŇčŇču kana daa niŇči ya sufusa'aŇčŇču, halli ni di daa bu yuui pam gba.

ref: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
text: PampaŇčŇč…Ē muna n yi mari la sufupeelli, pa la ya sufusa'aŇčŇču la zugu, amaa, ni, ya sufusa'aŇčŇču daa ky…õ ka ya takki ya s…Ēbeeri, ka taasi ya tooni. Naawunni zugu sufusa'aŇčŇču n‚ÄĎdaa la, ka dizugu ya daa bu labi nyaaŇčŇča ti tuma zugu.

ref: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
text: Naawunni zugu sufusa'aŇčŇču wa zugu siri ky…õ ka ti takkri ti s…Ēbeeri nti nya tuliginsim, ni ti sufu ku laa m‚ÄĎmiligi; duniya wa sufusa'aŇčŇču mun taasiri ti kum ni.

ref: Just look what God has done by making you feel sorry! You sincerely want to prove you are innocent. You are angry. You are shocked. You are eager to see that justice is done. You have proved that you were completely right in this matter.
text: Ya bu nya Naawunni zugu sufusa'aŇčŇču wa Ňč…Ēn suŇčŇči ya seem? - ya boori yooma m‚ÄĎmaali y…õtt…Ē'a maa, ka bu boori galiŇčŇču di zugu. Ya gy…õ la suuri n‚ÄĎniŇči tumb…õtumna la, ka z…Ēri tumbeoo la y…õla dabeem; ya boori nimmoosi ni ya maai y…õlli maa, ni ya kari y…õtt…Ē'a maa sariya ni y…õlimaŇčni. Bunseelli kam puuni ya daa wulisi, ni, ya yi y…õla wa ni, ka ka taalli di zugu.

ref: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
text: Man daa s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎti ya na maa gbinni muna, di pa la Ňč…Ēn daa niŇči taalli la zugu, bee, ban daa tum s…Ē taalli la zugu gba. Ay! - n daa s…Ēbi ni, ni n ti ky…õ ka ya baŇčŇči yan boori ti y…õla nimmoosi maa seem, ka di yi paalu ni, Naawunni tooni.

ref: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
text: DinŇč…Ē zaa zugu ti sufu kpamsiya. Ka n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči m‚ÄĎpaasi ti mammaŇčŇča kpamsigu zugu, ti mari sufupeelli Taituusi y…õla zugu, dama u sufu daa maaya, yan daa ti u sufudoaa la zugu.

ref: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
text: N daa pun t…Ē'asi n‚ÄĎti u n‚ÄĎnyuuri bara zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ya y…õla, ka ya mun daa bu diisi ma vi. Tin daa y…õli seelli zaa n‚ÄĎti ya la daa ny…õ la y…õlimaŇčni, ka lala ka tin daa nyu bara seesi n‚ÄĎti Taituusi ya zugu la gba siri daa niŇči y…õlimaŇčni.

ref: Titus loves all of you very much, especially when he remembers how you obeyed him and how you trembled with fear when you welcomed him.
text: Din paasiri u wurilim n‚ÄĎti ya ny…õ la: ni, u teaari la ya zaa Ňč…Ēn daa wum n‚ÄĎti u seem la, ni, ya daa deaai u ka z…Ēri dabeem pam tumbeeri la zugu.

ref: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
text: N nin toaai n‚ÄĎniŇči ya y…õdda zaa seelikam puuni, ka di niŇči ma nya'asim pam.

ref: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
text: T…Ē, m mabiisi, m boori la ya baŇčŇči Naawunni Ňč…Ēn daa zaŇčŇči piiniseaa n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇči Masidoonya dima maa.

ref: They gave as much as they could afford and even more, simply because they wanted to.
text: Dama mani nŇč…Ē n‚ÄĎdiri s…õhara, ni, ba daa tisi ban daa nyaŇčŇči seem - halli n‚ÄĎyakki ba kpeeŇčŇču t…Ēriga. Ba mammaŇčŇča yuubu ni

ref: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
text: ka ba daa b…õlim ti pam, ni, ti ky…õ ka ba la'am n‚ÄĎtumni tunsuŇčŇču wa.

ref: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
text: Ba mun daa bu niŇči tin daa teesi seem la, amaa ba daa daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči ba mansi n‚ÄĎti la Naawunni, ka naayi ti ti gba, Naawunni yuubu zugu.

ref: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
text: T…Ē: Taituusi daa pun daŇčŇči m‚ÄĎpiili lala tuma maa, ka dizugu ti daa susi u, ni, u tumma tunveelli wa n‚ÄĎnaai yarima gba saani.

ref: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna yarima Ňč…Ēn kur niŇčni seelikam suŇčŇča la zugu - di yi ny…õ y…õdda ni, bee y…õtt…Ē'a ni, bee y…õm, bee nimmoosi tumpu ni, bee wurilim ni, yan wuri ti suŇčŇčasuŇčŇča seem la - kur kpaŇčŇčma ya mansi m‚ÄĎmoori n‚ÄĎniŇči suŇčŇča n‚ÄĎgba tisiri lala piini maa.

ref: I am not ordering you to do this. I am simply testing how real your love is by comparing it with the concern that others have shown.
text: Di pa la n tiri ya la wadda, amaa m boori la n zamsi ya wurilim Ňč…Ēn paai seem n‚ÄĎnya, din nin ky…õ ka n zaŇčŇči seeba ban wuri nimmoosi maa wurilim m‚ÄĎma'asiri ya dinni.

ref: You know our Lord Jesus Christ treated us with undeserved grace by giving up all his riches, so you could become rich.
text: Dama ya mi ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita tunsuŇčŇču veelim Ňč…Ēn ny…õ seem maa: ni, u daa su arizikki zaa, amaa yarim zugu ka u daa leebi fara daana, ni lala ti ky…õ ka ya mun leebi bundaandima.

ref: A year ago you were the first ones to give, and you gave because you wanted to. So listen to my advice.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna n saawara maa nŇč…Ēa: ni, yarima n ny…õ seeba ban daa piili lala y…õtt…Ē'a maa yuumni la sa; ka di daa pa la yan daa daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎtum la k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa ya daa daŇčŇči m‚ÄĎpiili n‚ÄĎteesi lala tuma maa y…õla.

ref: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
text: T…Ē, ka pampaŇčŇč…Ē see ka ya tum tuma maa halli nti naai; ka lala nin ky…õ ka ya sufu ni teesa zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči tuma maa, ni ya tuma maa gba, nin d…Ēli la taaba halli nti naai; ka ya nin tum ya marigu t…Ēriga.

ref: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
text: Ya bu nya? - ninvugs…Ē yi ti boori ni u tisi, piini maa deaari d…Ēli la Ňč…Ēn mari seem, pa Ňč…Ēn ka seelli la.

ref: I am not trying to make life easier for others by making life harder for you. But it is only fair
text: Di pa la ni ti ky…õ ka seeba vuusiri ka yarim mun nya mugsigu; ay! amaa ni di ti sa'asi n‚ÄĎti s…Ēkam.

ref: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
text: PampaŇčŇč…Ē ya mara, ka seeba mun ka; ka ya nin suŇčŇči ba ban p…Ēsigi seela maa. Ban mun yi ti mara, ka ya ka, ba gba nin suŇčŇči ya: lala ka ya nin sa'asi taaba.

ref: just as the Scriptures say, ‚ÄúThose who gathered too much had nothing left. Those who gathered only a little had all they needed.‚ÄĚ Titus and His Friends
text: Hoo din pun s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎdooli seem la, ni#:- ‚ÄúBan daa va pam la dina daa bu zoaai n‚ÄĎyakki, ka ban mun daa va beela maa dina n daa bu p…Ēsigi ba.‚ÄĚ

ref: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
text: M puusiri Naawunni Ňč…Ēn daa ky…õ ka Taituusi gba nini moaai zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ya y…õla zugu.

ref: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
text: Dama Ňč…Ēn Taituusi daa wum ti susigu maa ni sufumaasim pam, ka laa n‚ÄĎgbaai u ky…õnni ya saani na la ni u toori zigizigi boorimma nimmoosi.

ref: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
text: M‚ÄĎpaasi u zugu, ti ya ky…õ ka ti mabis…Ē gba ti ky…õ ya saani na. Ňä…Ēna n ny…õ s…Ē Ňč…Ēn tumni lahabasuŇčŇču maa tuma, ka Naawunni niriba ban la'amni lugri kam zaa ni kur p…õ'ari u di zugu.

ref: The churches chose this follower to travel with us while we carry this gift that will bring praise to the Lord and show how much we hope to help.
text: M‚ÄĎpaasi lala, Ňč…Ēna ka ba daa yiisi ni u ti d…Ēli ti n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇči ti, tin taasi piini maa sahanseaa la; piini mun tisibu wa wulisiri ti Dugma gyirima paalu ni, ka laa n‚ÄĎwulisi tin boori ti suŇčŇči niriba nimbirimoaa seem la.

ref: We don't want anyone to find fault with the way we handle your generous gift.
text: Dama ti bu boori ni s…Ē galim ti zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ligri pam wa y…õla.

ref: But we want to do what pleases the Lord and what people think is right.
text: Dizugu ti kpaŇčŇči la ti mansi n‚ÄĎniŇčni din tu, pa la Naawunni tooni k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa saalidima tooni gba.

ref: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
text: Ti laa n‚ÄĎya tum la ti mabis…Ē m‚ÄĎpaasi ba zugu; ti daa pun nya ka doo wa tumni nimmoosi sahakam, ka pampaŇčŇč…Ē u niŇči ya y…õdda pam, ka dizugu u ya tum n‚ÄĎgaari lala.

ref: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
text: Taituusi muna - u ny…õ la n tuntuntaraana ya saani. Ka ti mabiisi wa mun z…õ la ba taaba zaaziiya, ba taaba mun n ny…õ baseeba ban la'amni n‚ÄĎgyeemni Naawunni tinsi zaa puuni; ka ban laa n‚ÄĎny…õ seeba ban ky…õ ka Naawunni nya p…õ'abu.

ref: Treat them in such a way that the churches will see your love and will know why we bragged about you.
text: Dinzugu ya ky…õ ka niriba wa ti baŇčŇči ya wurilim Ňč…Ēn ny…õ seem, ka laa m‚ÄĎbaŇčŇči din ky…õ ka ti nyuuri bara ya zugu, ka Naawunni niriba zaa ti nya.

ref: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
text: T…Ē: ka ligri toosigu n‚ÄĎtiri Naawunni niriba la y…õla muna - di pa la y…õlimugsa man saani ni n s…Ēbi di y…õla n‚ÄĎti ya.

ref: I know how eager you are to give. And I have proudly told the Lord's followers in Macedonia that you people in Achaia have been ready for a whole year. Now your desire to give has made them want to give.
text: Dama m pun mi halli yan boori ni ya suŇčŇči lala seem. Halli n pun tibgi ya yuuri Masidoonya dima saani, ni, ya Akaaya tingbaŇčŇču dima wa n pun maali ya siri ni ya tisi ka di yuui, halli yuumni la sa. Ka ya zigizigi la y…õla daa ky…õ ka ba niriba pam gbaai tuma wa m‚ÄĎpaasi.

ref: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
text: T…Ē, ka dinŇč…Ēna n tumni la ti mabiisi wa ni ba daŇčŇči n tooni n‚ÄĎky…õ ya saani na, ni tin nyu bariseesi ya y…õla wa zugu ku basi y…Ēri. Ti daa y…õli ba, ni, ya daa pun maali ya siri,

ref: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
text: ka m bu boori Masidoonya niriba ti d…Ēli ma na n‚ÄĎnya ka ya bu niŇči siri zaa. Lala nin diisi tirima vi, ka laa n‚ÄĎdiisi ya gba vi, tin daa niŇči ya y…õdda seem wa zugu.

ref: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
text: Lala zugu ka n daa teesi, ni, di kpa la talasi ni n kpamsi ti mabiisi wa ka ba daŇčŇči ma na n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇči ya ni ya ti s…õ'asi ya piiniseesi yan daa pun y…õli, ni, ya nin tisi la. Lala nin ky…õ ka a siri ny…õ la wurilim piini, pa ban mugsi ya seesi zugu.

ref: Remember this saying, ‚ÄúA few seeds make a small harvest, but a lot of seeds make a big harvest.‚ÄĚ
text: Ya teaama dinŇč…Ēa: Ňč…Ēn butti n‚ÄĎya'ara ti ya n‚ÄĎŇčmaari ni n‚ÄĎya'ara; ka Ňč…Ēn mun n butti n‚ÄĎzoaara ti ya n‚ÄĎŇčmaari ni n‚ÄĎzoaara.

ref: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
text: Amaa see ka s…Ēkam ti tisi u sufu Ňč…Ēn teesi, ni, u tisima seem, pa la mugsigu zugu, dama Naawunni wuri la Ňč…Ēn tisiri sufupeelim zugu.

ref: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
text: Ka Ňč…Ēn Naawunni nin ky…õ ka u piini zaa paari ya saani na, ni ya ti mari yan boori seelli zaa sahakam, ka laa m‚ÄĎmari m‚ÄĎpaasi ni ya ti zaŇčŇčni n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇčni niriba.

ref: The Scriptures say, ‚ÄúGod freely gives his gifts to the poor, and always does right.‚ÄĚ
text: Hoo din pun s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎdooli seem zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ninvugs…Ē Ňč…Ēn tisiri la, ni#:- ‚ÄúU zaŇčŇči piini n‚ÄĎwurim n‚ÄĎtisi fara dima, Ka kpalim la y…õlimaŇčni daana sahakam.‚ÄĚ

ref: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
text: Ka Naawunni n ny…õ s…Ē Ňč…Ēn zaŇčŇči bumbura n‚ÄĎtiri ban butti la, ka laa n‚ÄĎtiri bundira ni ba ti di. Ka u siri nin zaŇčŇči bumbura n‚ÄĎtisi yarima, ka laa m‚ÄĎpaasi ya antaam zaa - di ny…õ la: y…õlimaŇčni puuni beesigu.

ref: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
text: Ya nin b…õ ni hoo seeba bam mara, bunseelikam zaa puuni; ka di nin ky…õ ka ya tisiri ya yuubu sahakam: ka lala nin ky…õ ka ba puusi Naawunni ya tuma wa zugu, tirim mun saani.

ref: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
text: T…Ē, ka dizugu yan tumni suŇčŇčsim wa gbinni pa la, ni, ya nin suŇčŇči Naawunni niriba ban p…Ēsigi bunseesi zii k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa ka di laa m‚ÄĎmari la wulisigu pam ka naayi paasiri Naawunni puusigu.

ref: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
text: Ya yi tum suŇčŇčsim tuma wa n‚ÄĎnaai, di nin wulisi ya beesisuŇčŇču beebu y…õla. Ka niriba nin ti nya; ka p…õ'ai Naawunni, ni, ya deaari Ňč…Ēn Naawunni noori n‚ÄĎt…Ē'asiri n‚ÄĎwulisiri Kirisita lahabasuŇčŇču y…õla y…õlimaŇčni Ňč…Ēn b…õ seem. Ka din paasi lala zugu, ni, ya yiisiri ya sufu yuubu piini n‚ÄĎtiri ba, ni s…Ēkam.

ref: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
text: Ka ba nin laa n‚ÄĎsusiri Naawunni n‚ÄĎtiri ya, ka nin boori ya y…õla ni nimbirimoaa, dama Naawunni ti ya u piinisuma pam gba, halli nti yakki.

ref: Do you think I am a coward when I am with you and brave when I am far away? Well, I ask you to listen, because Christ himself was humble and gentle.
text: Man, P…Ēla, n‚ÄĎs…Ēbri wa: ka n susiri ya, Kirisita sugru zugu, ni u nirilim zugu. Halli ban y…õtti n y…õla seem maa y…Ēri ka n susiri ya - dama ba y…õtti, ni, n yi b…õ ya saani n ny…õ la s…Ē Ňč…Ēn z…Ēri vi ni dabeem, amaa n yi ka ya saani muna m mari la sufukpeemni ni dablim.

ref: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
text: N susigu wa gbinni ny…õ la: ni, n di ky…õ ya saani na nti niŇči sufukpeemni, dama n teesiri, ni, di nin kpa la talasi ni n zaŇčŇči n sufukpeemni m‚ÄĎboosi ninvugseeba boosa; dama ba y…õtti, ni, man ny…õ la s…Ē Ňč…Ēn tuusi la t…Ēppu hoo duniya wa dima Ňč…Ēn tuusiri seem maa.

ref: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
text: Ni ti b…õ la duniya wa ni maa zaa y…Ēri, ti bu zabri hoo duniya wa t…Ēppu Ňč…Ēn tuusiri seem.

ref: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
text: Neenseesi tin mari n‚ÄĎzabra maa pa la duniya wa t…Ēppu neema: ay! - a mari la Naawunni yiiko, n‚ÄĎnyaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎsa'amni kpeeŇčŇču ziziisi. Ti sa'amni la nangbankpeemni y…õla gba,

ref: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
text: m‚ÄĎpaasi bunseelikam zaa kan duusiri kamaŇčŇča ka za'asiri Naawunni y…õla bamsim. Ti mun zabri ni ti ti gbaasi sufu ni teesa zaa, n‚ÄĎky…õ ka a zaa ti wum n‚ÄĎti Kirisita.

ref: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
text: Ka ya yi ti sakki wumpu n‚ÄĎnaai, ti nin maali siri ni ti darigi ban ku wum la zaa tuba.

ref: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
text: Ya nini n g…Ēsiri y…õla ka ya teesiri, ni, a g…Ēsibu siri wulisiri la a gbinni zaa Ňč…Ēn b…õ seem. Ay! - Ňč…Ēnkam niŇči y…õdda, ni, u ny…õ la Kirisita nira, see ka u maali n‚ÄĎteesi, ni, tirim gba ny…õ la Kirisita niriba lala.

ref: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
text: Di yi pa seem n nin nyu bara zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ti Dugma Ňč…Ēn zaŇčŇči yiikoseaa n‚ÄĎti ti la, halli nti yakki s…ĒsuŇčŇču gba; Ňč…Ēn Naawunni siri daa zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎti ti, ni ti ti duusi ya beesigu, pa ti sigsi ka. Amaa vi ku mari ma bara nyuubu wa zugu.

ref: And I am not trying to scare you with my letters.
text: M bu boori di Ňčmanni hoo man s…Ēbri n gbana wa ni n ti v…Ēlisiri ya.

ref: Some of you are saying, ‚ÄúPaul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.‚ÄĚ
text: Dama ninvugseeba ban y…õtti n y…õla, ni, n gbana n ny…õ buntibsa ka mugsira, amaa m mammaŇčŇča yi ti b…õ ya saani sahanseaa la n ny…õ la ninvugy…Ēri, ningbimbaaliga daana; ni, ‚ÄúKa u y…õtt…Ē'a wa muna - a ka yaa halli beela!‚ÄĚ

ref: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
text: See ka lala niriba baŇčŇčma, ni, tin ny…õ seem ti gbana s…Ēppu maa ni, sahanseaa tin ka ya saani la, lala ka ti nin ny…õ ti tuma maa ni, sahanseaa tin b…õ ni maa.

ref: We won't dare compare ourselves with those who think so much of themselves. But they are foolish to compare themselves with themselves.
text: Niriba wa n nyari ba mansi k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa tirima ku toaai n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči ba y…õla m‚ÄĎma'asi ti mansi, bee n‚ÄĎla'am m‚ÄĎb…õ ba saani. Ba zaŇčŇči ba mansi y…õla n‚ÄĎzamsiri taaba; ba zaŇčŇči ba mansi m‚ÄĎma'asiri la taaba. Ba siri ka y…õm halli fiiŇč gba!

ref: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
text: Tirim mun ku ma'asi ti mansi n‚ÄĎnyu bara n‚ÄĎyakki din mari soori. Ti nin s…õ'ali ti ma'asigu ni zamsigu y…õla ni ya'aseaa Naawunni Ňč…Ēn zaali ti - halli nti paai ya saani na gba.

ref: We are not bragging more than we should. After all, we did bring the message about Christ to you.
text: Ti yi daa bu paai ya na, ti barinyuubu naa n‚ÄĎku d…Ēli soori; amaa di pa lala, dama ti siri daa pun daŇčŇči ya saani na n‚ÄĎtaasi Kirisita lahabasuŇčŇču n‚ÄĎti ya.

ref: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
text: Ti mun bu yakkri n‚ÄĎgatti ti t…Ēriga n‚ÄĎnyuuri bara zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ninvugseeba tuma m‚ÄĎpaasi ti maŇčtoori dina zugu. Amaa ti mari tama, ni, ya y…õdda nin zoaara, ka lala ka ti tuma zii gba nin y…õligi ya saani.

ref: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
text: Halli ni ti nin toaai m‚ÄĎmooli lahabasuŇčŇču maa n‚ÄĎti ya tooni sa tingbanseesi niriba. Ti bu boori ti kp…õ s…Ē tuma ya'ari ni n‚ÄĎnyuuri bara tunseesi Ňč…Ēn pun tum n‚ÄĎnaai la zugu.

ref: The Scriptures say, ‚ÄúIf you want to brag, then brag about the Lord.‚ÄĚ
text: Ni, ‚ÄúKy…õ ka Ňč…Ēn ya nyu bara zaa nyuuri a ti Dugma y…õla zugu.‚ÄĚ

ref: You may brag about yourself, but the only approval that counts is the Lord's approval.
text: Di siri pa la Ňč…Ēn p…õ'ari u maŇčŇča la yuuri ka ba duusira, amaa ti Dugma Ňč…Ēn p…õ'ai s…Ē la.

ref: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
text: Amaa dabeem mari ma, dama n teaari Hawa y…õla, ni, waafu daa zaŇčŇči u put…Ēyam n‚ÄĎy…Ēmsi u n‚ÄĎnyaŇčŇči u; man mun n z…Ēri, ni, di yi pa seem ya nin burigi n‚ÄĎyi y…õlimaŇčni s…Ēseaa yan nin mari n‚ÄĎd…Ēli Kirisita wa ni.

ref: We told you about Jesus, and you received the Holy Spirit and accepted our message. But you let some people tell you about another Jesus. Now you are ready to receive another spirit and accept a different message.
text: Dama s…Ē yi ky…õ na m‚ÄĎmoonni Yisa s…Ē y…õla, ka di pa la tirim Yisa wa, ya nin sakki n‚ÄĎdeaai lala; bee, yan deaai la sis…Ē Ňč…Ēn pa yan pun deaai Sis…Ē wa, bee, lahabasuŇčŇču kan pa yan deaai seaa wa, anŇč…Ē zaa ka ya nin sakki n‚ÄĎdeaai lala ni nimbirimoaa.

ref: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
text: Halli ni n y…õtt…Ē'a pa la y…õtt…Ē'azulima maa zaa, man lee m‚ÄĎmari la bamsim. Ti daa pun wulisi anŇč…Ē zaa kasi n‚ÄĎti ya, ka di d…Ēli la s…Ēya zaa.

ref: Was it wrong for me to lower myself and honor you by preaching God's message free of charge?
text: Ya bu nya? - n daa sigsi m maŇčŇča ni n ti duusi ya, dama n daa mooli Naawunni lahabasuŇčŇču n‚ÄĎti ya la y…Ēri, samni ka ni: t…Ē, taalli ka n daa tum maa?

ref: I robbed other churches by taking money from them to serve you.
text: N daa fa la Naawunni niriba ban b…õ tinseesi la ni, dama n daa deaai la suŇčŇčsim ba saani ni n ti suŇčŇči ya.

ref: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
text: Ka man Ňč…Ēn daa b…õ ya saani nti p…Ēsigi seelli maa, n daa bu zaŇčŇči n y…õla m‚ÄĎmugsi ya s…Ēa; dama ti mabiseeba ban daa yi Masidoonya na la n daa tiri ma man daa p…Ēsigi seelli zaa. N daa bu sakki n‚ÄĎky…õ ka n y…õla mugsi ya s…Ēa, ka n ya kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ lala.

ref: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
text: Kirisita y…õlimaŇčni Ňč…Ēn saligi m‚ÄĎb…õ n saani wa Ňč…Ēna, ya Akaaya tingbaŇčŇču ni s…Ē ku toaai n‚ÄĎta'ai ma bara wa nyuubu ni.

ref: And it isn't because I don't love you. God himself knows how much I do love you.
text: Ka b…Ēzugu? - ni, man bu wuri ya zugu, bee? Ay! - Naawunni m mi, ni, n wuri ya!

ref: I plan to go on doing just what I have always done. Then those people won't be able to brag about doing the same things we are doing.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna n ya kpalim n‚ÄĎtumni la man tumni seem wa. Dama ninvugseeba m b…õ ni ban boori ba nya soori n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči ba mansi n‚ÄĎwulisi, ni, tin ni ban sa'ai taaba: t…Ē, n tuma gbinni ny…õ la: ni, n ti nyaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎta'ai ba, ba barinyuubu ziiya.

ref: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
text: Lala niriba ny…õ la ziri tuumudima. Ba tuma zii la muna, y…õlimaŇčni ka di ni. Ba gyinni m‚ÄĎma'ari ziri, ni, ba ny…õ la Kirisita tuumudima.

ref: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
text: Ka lala ka alahazibu, dama Sintaani mammaŇčŇča gba ma'ari ziri, ni, u ny…õ la malaaka neesim daana.

ref: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
text: Dizugu di ka alahazibu, ni, u nyaand…Ēliba gba yi ma'ari ziri, ni, ba d…Ēli la y…õlimaŇčni nyaaŇčŇča. Amaa ba naari nin ny…õ din d…Ēli la ba tuma maa.

ref: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
text: N laa n‚ÄĎy…õtti ya, ni, yan di ky…õ ka ya s…Ē nya ma la gy…õrigu. Di yi pa lala, see ka ya di sugru n‚ÄĎdeaai ma hoo gy…õrigu, ka dinŇč…Ēna n nin nyu bara beela.

ref: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
text: NyamaŇčŇča bara wa ziiya, m bu t…Ē'asiri an d…Ēli la soori ti Dugma saani; n t…Ē'asiri gy…õrilim y…õtt…Ē'a.

ref: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
text: Ni, niriba pam n nyuuri bara ba duniya wa y…õla zugu: t…Ē, lala ka man gba ya n‚ÄĎnyu bara.

ref: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
text: Ya bu nya? - ya diri sugru n‚ÄĎtiri ban k…ĒŇčŇčni y…õm, yan mari y…õm pam maa zugu.

ref: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
text: Ninvugs…Ē yi ti zaŇčŇči ya hoo u daaba n ny…õ ya, t…Ē - ya nin di sugru n‚ÄĎsakki lala: s…Ē yi diri ya gba, ya nin sakki, bee, s…Ē yi fa ya, bee, s…Ē yi ti zaali u maŇčŇča ya tooni, bee, s…Ē yi l…Ēbi ya tamp…õkka - anŇč…Ē zaa puuni ya nin di sugru n‚ÄĎsakki lala.

ref: I am ashamed to say we are too weak to behave in such a way. If they can brag, so can I, but it is a foolish thing to do.
text: Man muna, n daa ka yaa ni n ti tum anŇč…Ē zaa n‚ÄĎniŇči ya - di yi pa seem n yaa p…Ēsigri wa nin diisi ma vi. Amaa nira Ňč…Ēn nyaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎnyu bara seelikam zaa zugu la muna - t…Ē, man gba nin toaai n‚ÄĎnyu di bara: ya nyama, n siri t…Ē'asiri la gy…õrilim; bee m ma'ai ni?

ref: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
text: Ni, ba ny…õ la Hibruu niriba? - t…Ē, man gba. Ni, ba ny…õ la Izra…õli dima? - man gba n ny…õa. Ni, ba ny…õ la Ibrahim ya'ansi? Lala ka man gba n ny…õa.

ref: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
text: Ni, ba tumni la Kirisita tuma? - ay! mani n gaari lala. Dama man daa tum n‚ÄĎgaari ba, n‚ÄĎkp…õ sarika n‚ÄĎgaari; ba daa bu ma, halli ka n daa ti ya kpi, ka di daa maali m‚ÄĎmaali n‚ÄĎniŇči ma n‚ÄĎgaari ba zaa. T…Ē, pa s…Ē Ňč…Ēn zugu n labgi y…õtt…Ē'a nŇč…Ēa? - Ay, gy…õrilim n siri ny…õ di!

ref: Five times my own people gave me
text: Nap…Ēmbunu ka Y…õhudiyadima maa daa feebi ma kpaasa pisinaasi yinni ka ni.

ref: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
text: Nap…Ēmbuta muna ka ba daa bu ma daari, ka zaŇčŇči kuga n‚ÄĎl…Ēbi ma yimmu: nap…Ēmbuta ka n daa b…õ nyarintitaari ni ka ka sa'am n‚ÄĎsim teeku koom ni, halli n daa kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ teekuzuliŇčŇču ni, n‚ÄĎyuui yuŇčŇču n‚ÄĎneaai beoo nti paai zaanoori yaasa ka n naayi nya fa-m‚ÄĎbasi.

ref: I have worked and struggled and spent many sleepless nights. I have gone hungry and thirsty and often had nothing to eat. I have been cold from not having enough clothes to keep me warm.
text: N tumni tunkara n‚ÄĎnamsira, halli sahaseaa m bu gbisira; k…Ēm m mari ma, ni k…Ēnyuuri, ni nangbantoo; waari gba mari ma, ka n ky…õnni n‚ÄĎgyinni y…Ēri.

ref: Besides everything else, each day I am burdened down, worrying about all the churches.
text: Kan paasi anŇč…Ē zaasa, din mugsiri ma pam dabsa zaa la ny…õ la: ni, n teesiri Naawunni niriba zaa y…õla y…õtt…Ē'a maa.

ref: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
text: T…Ē, ka dinŇč…Ēna n yi ya nyu bara, see ka n nyu a man Ňč…Ēn bugsi seem la zugu.

ref: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
text: Naawunni m mi, ni, m bu ma'ari la ziri, ka u ny…õ la ti Dugma Yisa Ba la, ka su p…õ'abu sahakam zaa.

ref: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
text: See ka n kpalim n‚ÄĎnyuuri n bara wa. Ni anfaani seaa ka di ni maa zaa y…Ēri, n nin tugi m‚ÄĎpaai zii nyaabu y…õla, ni ti Dugma Ňč…Ēn kasigi bunseesi n‚ÄĎti ma la.

ref: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
text: PampaŇčŇč…Ē n laa n‚ÄĎniŇči siri ni n ti ky…õ ya saani na, din paasiri n ky…õnni buta zugu; ka ky…õnni wa saha gba n ku zaŇčŇči n y…õla m‚ÄĎmugsiri ya. Dama di pa la m boori ya neema, bee, ya ligri, amaa ya mammansi ka m boora. Ya bu nya? - di pa la biisi n ya m‚ÄĎb…Ē n‚ÄĎzaali n‚ÄĎti ba badima ni ba madima, amaa ba badima ni ba madima nin b…Ē n‚ÄĎzaali n‚ÄĎti ba.

ref: As I said, only God really knows if this man was in his body at the time.
text: Ka n laa m‚ÄĎmi di daama y…õla - di daa ny…õ la u maŇčtoori ningbiŇčŇču n‚ÄĎdaa la, bee, u daa yi u ningbiŇčŇču m‚ÄĎbasi maa, n ku toaai m‚ÄĎbaŇčŇči, kulla Naawunni m mi -

ref: But he was taken up into paradise, where he heard things too wonderful to tell.
text: ni, ba daa gbaai u nti du n‚ÄĎkp…õ Naawunni zisuŇčŇču, nti wum y…õliseesi an ku toaai n‚ÄĎy…õli; soori ka ni ni ninsaala ti t…Ē'asi a taabu, halli beela.

ref: I will brag about that man, but not about myself, except to say how weak I am.
text: T…Ē: lala doo taabu y…õla zugu ka n nin nyu bara; n ku nyu bara m mammaŇčŇča y…õla zugu, ka di yi pa la n nyu a man Ňč…Ēn bugsa seem la zugu.

ref: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
text: Halli n yi ya nyu bara, n ku tumni gy…õrilim di zugu, dama n ya n‚ÄĎt…Ē'asiri la y…õlimaŇčni. Amaa n nin ky…õ ni, ni s…Ē di teesi n y…õla pam, n‚ÄĎgaari ba n nin toaai m‚ÄĎbaŇčŇči a seem, ban g…Ēsiri n tuma ka wumni n y…õligu la sahanseaa la.

ref: Of course, I am now referring to the wonderful things I saw. One of Satan's angels was sent to make me suffer terribly, so that I would not feel too proud.
text: Zii ni kasigri y…õla wa daa ny…õ la alahazibu n‚ÄĎti ma; dinzugu Naawunni bu boori ni karimbaani mari ma a zugu. Ka di zugu n daa nya Sintaani tuumu tuma n ningbina wa ni nti mugsi ma hoo goaa Ňč…Ēn yi b…õ ni n‚ÄĎkusiri ma.

ref: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
text: Nap…Ēmbuta ka n daa susi ti Dugma, ni, u nin ky…õ ka ka yi ka ky…õ ma.

ref: But he replied, ‚ÄúMy gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.‚ÄĚ So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
text: Amaa u daa y…õli ma, ni, ‚ÄúM piini la b…õ ni, halli nyin bu sumni di la, ka di nin sa'asi n‚ÄĎti i. Dama n yiiko zoaari m‚ÄĎpaari ka t…Ēriga n‚ÄĎtiri bugsim daandima maa.‚ÄĚ Dinzugu n nin maali n‚ÄĎnyu bara man bugsa seem la zugu. Lala nin ky…õ ka Kirisita yiiko nin kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ n saani sahakam.

ref: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
text: DinŇč…Ē zugu n nin nya sufudoaa man yi bugsa sahanseaa la, ni ban tuuri ma sahanseaa, ni wahala diibu saha gba; ka laa n‚ÄĎnya sufudoaa namsa ni y…õlimugsa ni, di yi ny…õ Kirisita zugu. Man bukki ni maa, dina ka m mari la yaa.

ref: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
text: T…Ē: n leebi la gy…õrigu ka t…Ē'asi gy…õrilim n‚ÄĎnaai. Yarim mun ky…õ ka n niŇči lala: yan daa yi z…õ n nyaaŇčŇča di naa n‚ÄĎs…Ēa. Ban boonni seeba, ni, ‚Äėtumudima ban gaari zaa‚Äô la muna - halli ni man pa seelli maa zaa, m bu p…Ēsigi ba ni.

ref: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
text: Bunseesi an wulisiri tuumumaŇčni y…õla la ka n daa tumni ya saani, ana ni sugru diibu zaa: an mari alahazibu la, ni makkri y…õla, ni yiiko tuma nla.

ref: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
text: Bumb…Ē saani ka ya daa fiilim m‚ÄĎbu paai Naawunni niriba ban b…õ tinseesi la zaa maa ziiya? - ni, man daa bu zaŇčŇči n y…õla m‚ÄĎmugsi ya la zugu? Eeh, m badima, ya ky…õ n taalli kanŇč…Ē m‚ÄĎp…õŇčŇči ma!

ref: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
text: Ni, t…Ē! halli m bu zaŇčŇči n y…õla m‚ÄĎmugsi ya gba, amaa ni dinŇč…Ē zaa y…Ēri, man Ňč…Ēn ny…õ y…Ēmsa zaa daana wa, n daa y…Ēmsi ya n‚ÄĎgbaai ya.

ref: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
text: N daa b…õlim la Taituusi, ni, u ky…õ ya saani na, ka daa tum ti mabis…Ē ni u d…Ēli u na m‚ÄĎpaasi. T…Ē, Taituusi daa fa ya neema? - Ay! u daa bu fa. Pa Sii yinni ni soori yinni maa ka ti d…Ēla la - m mammaŇčŇča ni ban zaa?

ref: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna ya yi teesiri, ni, ti t…Ē'asiri ti y…õtt…Ē'a wa ni yarima ti kari ti y…õlli sariya? Ay, di pa lala, n z…Ēsuma! Ti b…õ la Kirisita saani ka ti t…Ē'asiri Naawunni tooni. Ka tin niŇčni seelli zaa ny…õ la din nin kpamsi ya.

ref: I am afraid when I come, we won't be pleased with each other. I fear that some of you may be arguing or jealous or angry or selfish or gossiping or insulting each other. I even fear that you may be proud and acting like a mob.
text: Dama n z…Ēri la dabeem, man Ňč…Ēn teesi, ni, di yi pa seem n nin ky…õ na ka ku paai ya hoo man boori yan ny…õ seem la. Ka ya gba ku nya ma yan boori m b…õ seem maa. Ii, dabeem mari ma, ni, nangbankpeemni nin b…õ ni, ni nyuuri zappu, ni nyigbu, ni suuri, ni w…Ēligri, ni nyaanzum, ni galagala, ni karimbaani, ni basabasa zaa tuma an bu d…Ēli soori.

ref: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
text: Dabeem m mari ma yaasa, ni, n yi ky…õ na ka Naawunni nin laa n‚ÄĎsigsi ma ya nini ni yaasa, ka n nin nya sufusa'aŇčŇču pam ban pun tum tumbeeri la zugu, ka ba ku sakki n‚ÄĎtakki n‚ÄĎyi lala y…õla ni. Ba tumbeeri wa b…õ la hoo da'ari tuma la, ni zina, ni k…Ēribeeri tuma an bu d…Ēli soori halli zaa.

ref: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, ‚ÄúAny charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.‚ÄĚ
text: N ky…õnni kanŇč…Ē nin paasi buta: ni, ‚ÄúY…õlli kam zaa nin zaani suŇčŇča, niriba ayi-ata yi di di s…õhara n‚ÄĎd…Ēli la taaba.‚ÄĚ

ref: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
text: N buyi ky…õnni maa saha ka n daa pun b…õ ya saani nti daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎy…õli n y…õtt…Ē'a wa, ka man Ňč…Ēn ka ya saani pampaŇčŇč…Ē n ya maali n‚ÄĎy…õli yaasa. Ni, n yi labi na n ku ky…õ ban daa pun tum tumbeeri la, ka ku laa n‚ÄĎky…õ baseeba ban paasi ba zugu la pampaŇčŇč…Ēa.

ref: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
text: Di gbinni ny…õ la: ya daa boori la n wulisi ya ka ya baŇčŇči, ni, Kirisita t…Ē'asiri man y…õtt…Ē'a wa puuni. T…Ē: ya baŇčŇčma, ni, u pa la bumbugsiga n‚ÄĎti ya: ay! - u siri mari la yiiko ya saani.

ref: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
text: U siri daa bukki ni ka ba daa kpaasi u n‚ÄĎtabli d…Ēpulli zugu; amaa ni lala maa zaa y…Ēri, pampaŇčŇč…Ē u mari la ny…Ēvuri m‚ÄĎb…õ ni Naawunni yiiko zugu. Lala taabu ti gba la'am u saani m‚ÄĎbukki, amaa Naawunni yiiko zugu ti nin b…õ u ni n‚ÄĎtumni n‚ÄĎtiri ya.

ref: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
text: Ya viisim ya mansi n‚ÄĎnya yan b…õ la y…õdda niŇčbu maa ni, bee? - Ya zamsima ya mansi. Bee, ya na bu mi, ni, Yisa Kirisita b…õ la ya saani? Ya yi pa la seeba ban lu zamsigu ni, u b…õ ni.

ref: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
text: M mari tama, ni, ya nin ti baŇčŇči, ni, tirima bu lu zamsigu ni.

ref: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
text: T…Ē: ti susiri Naawunni, ni, ya ku tum din bu tu. Pa la ni niriba ti nya tirima, ni, ti nyaŇčŇči zamsigu maa ni. Ay! - tin boori seem ny…õ la: ni, yarima nin tumni din tu, halli ni tirim b…õ la hoo ban lu zamsigu ni gba.

ref: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
text: Dama ti ku toaai n‚ÄĎniŇči seelli n‚ÄĎgalim y…õlimaŇčni maa, see ka ti d…Ēli la y…õlimaŇčni soori n‚ÄĎtumna.

ref: Even though we are weak, we are glad that you are strong, and we pray you will do even better.
text: Ti yi ti bukki ka yan mun kpeem, ti mari sufupeelim di zugu. Ti kur susiri Naawunni, ni, ya nin nyaŇčŇči seelikam suŇčŇča.

ref: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
text: Lala zugu ka n s…Ēbri anŇč…Ē man na ka ya saani maa, ni n yi ti ky…õ na n ku mari kuk…Ēri nyiim n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči n yiiko m‚ÄĎmugsiri ya. Ti Dugma zaŇčŇči yiiko wa n‚ÄĎti ma, ni m maali ya y…õla ka a kyaŇčŇči tooni ka ku labi nyaaŇčŇča.

ref: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
text: Y…õtt…Ē'a maa naari, m mabiisi, ny…õ la: ni, ya kpalim suŇčŇča. Ya ky…õ ka ya kpaŇčŇči ya mansi, ky…õ ka ya sufu kpamsi, ka mari nangbanyinni n‚ÄĎti taaba, ni sufudoaa zaa. Naawunni siri ny…õ la Sufudoaa ni Wurilim Daana, ka u nin b…õ ya saani.

ref: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
text: Ya puusima taaba suŇčŇčasuŇčŇča ti wurilim puusigu ni. TiŇčŇča wa Naawunni niriba puusiri ya zaa na.

ref: From the apostle Paul and from all the Lord's followers with me. I was chosen to be an apostle by Jesus Christ and by God the Father, who raised him from death. No mere human chose or appointed me to this work. To the churches in Galatia:
text: Man ni ti mabiseeba ban b…õ kpa m‚ÄĎpaasi n zugu n‚ÄĎs…Ēbri n‚ÄĎtiri yarima - ya Naawunni la'aŇčŇču dima zaa ban b…õ la Gal…õseaa tingbaŇčŇču ni.

ref: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
text: Ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya nin ti ya piinisuma ni alaaf…õa zaa.

ref: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
text: Din y…õ n‚ÄĎky…õ ka ti tuligi n‚ÄĎyi zuna tumbeeri sahabeoo puuni nŇč…Ēa#:- Ňč…Ēn Yisa Kirisita daa zaŇčŇči u maŇčŇča n‚ÄĎtisi, ti tumbeeri zugu; ka di daa d…Ēli ti Ba Naawunni Ňč…Ēn daa boori seem.

ref: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
text: Tibgri b…õ la Ňč…Ēn Naawunni saani halli saha din ka t…Ēriga! Ammi.

ref: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
text: Di gy…õri ma pam ya y…õla zugu! Dama di na bu yuui ka ya zaa daa Ňčmaligi n‚ÄĎza'asi ninvugs…Ē Ňč…Ēn daa booli ya u saani na, u piinisuma la zugu, ka ya daa dee n‚ÄĎsakki n‚ÄĎtiri lahabasunseaa.

ref: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
text: Y…õlimaŇčni, ‚Äėlahabasunseaa‚Äô laa n‚ÄĎka ni, amaa n dee n‚ÄĎy…õtti la lala, dama ninvugseeba b…õ ni n‚ÄĎgy…õtti ya y…õm ka kpaŇčŇčni ba mansi ni ba takki Yisa Kirisita lahabasuŇčŇču maa.

ref: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
text: Amaa di yi ti ny…õ tirima - bee, halli malaaka Ňč…Ēn yi arizana ni na gba - n yi mooli lahabasuŇčŇču n‚ÄĎti ya ka ka b…õ ka k…Ēk…Ē ka ky…õ tin daa mooli lahabasunseaa n‚ÄĎti ya la, Ňč…Ēn sa'amma m‚ÄĎbasi bugum puuni halli saha kan ka naari.

ref: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
text: Ti daa pun y…õli lala, ka n laa n‚ÄĎy…õtti ya wa yaasa: nira kam yi mooli lahabaseaa n‚ÄĎti ya ka ka b…õ ka k…Ēk…Ē ka ky…õ yan daa pun deaai seaa maa, di daama Ňč…Ēn sa'amma m‚ÄĎbasi halli saha kan ka naari!

ref: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
text: Kala, dinŇč…Ē Ňčmani kaman n boori la ni ninsaalidima nini tigi ma? Bee, Naawunni nintigri ka m boora? Ni, n kpaŇčŇčni n maŇčŇča la ni s…Ēkam ti baŇčŇči n y…õla, fa! Ay! - N da naa m‚ÄĎboori n niŇči lala, n da naa n‚ÄĎku niŇči Kirisita tuntumna, walla!

ref: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
text: Ya ky…õ ka n y…õli ya, m mabiisi, ni, lahabasunseaa man daa mooli n‚ÄĎti ya maa pa la ninsaala dinni.

ref: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
text: N daa bu deaai ka s…Ēs…Ē saani, bee, s…Ē n daa zaŇčŇči ka n‚ÄĎwulisi ma. Di daa ny…õ la Yisa Masiiya mammaŇčŇča Ňč…Ēn daa kasigi ka n‚ÄĎti ma.

text: Ka dinzugu Yisa saani ka Y…õhudiyadima ni ban pa Y…õhudiyadima y…õla laa n‚ÄĎka ni, bee, daaba ni ban su ba mansi y…õla, bee, dappa ni p…Ē'aba y…õla - anŇč…Ē zaa laa n‚ÄĎka ni. Ya zaasa ny…õ la bunyinni Kirisita Yisa Masiiya puuni.

ref: Children who are under age are no better off than slaves, even though everything their parents own will someday be theirs.

ref: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,

ref: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
text: Ka dinzugu pampaŇčŇč…Ē i laa m‚ÄĎpa la u daabri amaa u biiya. Ka nyin Ňč…Ēn ny…õ u bii maa zugu, Naawunni nin zaŇčŇči Ňč…Ēn mari bunseela ni u tisi u biisi la n‚ÄĎti i.

text: M mabiisi, n b…õlimni ya ni, ni, ya b…õ ni hoo man b…õ seem wa, dama man gba daa b…õ la hoo yan b…õ seem maa. Ya bu tum ma taaliseaa zaa.

text: Halli ni n ningbina y…õla Ňč…Ēn daa mugsi ya pam maa zaa y…Ēri, ya daa bu yi n nyaaŇčŇča, bee, n‚ÄĎkari ma. Amaa ya daa deaai mani kaman yan nin deaai arizana ni malaakas…Ē seem, bee, hoo yan daa deaai Yisa Masiiya seem la.

ref: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.

ref: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
text: N daa kur boori la n da b…õ ya saani pampaŇčŇč…Ēa, din da naa n‚ÄĎky…õ ka n takki man Ňč…Ēn t…Ē'asiri seem n‚ÄĎtiri ya. Di mugsi ma pam ya zugu!

ref: Some of you would like to be under the rule of the Law of Moses. But do you know what the Law says?
text: Ky…õ ka n boosi yarim ninvugseeba ban boori ba b…õ zaaligu suulinsi ni la: ya daa bu wum fukumsi zaaligudima maa Ňč…Ēn wulisi seem, bee?

ref: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
text: Dama di s…Ēbi n‚ÄĎdooli, ni, Ibrahim daa mari la bidibsi ayi; ka yinni daa ny…õ daabp…Ē'a biiya, ka Ňč…Ēnla mun daa ny…õ birikyimp…Ē'a biiya.

ref: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
text: Ba daa kur d…Ē'ai u bis…Ē Ňč…Ēn daa ny…õ p…Ē'adaabri bii maa la hoo p…Ē'a Ňč…Ēn kur d…Ē'ari bii kam zaa seem maa; amaa u bis…Ē Ňč…Ēn daa ny…õ birikyimp…Ē'a la bii maa Ňč…Ēna, ba daa d…Ē'ai Ňč…Ēnla Naawunni nangbambasiri basibu puuni.

ref: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
text: Y…õtt…Ē'a wa ny…õ la hoo y…õtt…Ē'any…õsa, ka a mari la gbinni n‚ÄĎtiri ya: p…Ē'aba ayi wa z…õ la nangbanyinni loobu y…õtt…Ē'a ayi zaani. P…Ē'as…Ē Ňč…Ēn daa d…Ē'ai biisi daabtiri puuni la ny…õ la Hagaara, Ňč…Ēna n z…õ Sainayi zoori la zaani.

ref: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
text: T…Ē: Sainayi zoori wa z…õ la Arabii tingbaŇčŇču la ni - Hagaara nla. Ka ka mun z…õ la Gy…õrusal…õm tiŇčŇča zaani - pampaŇčŇč…Ē Gy…õrusal…õm la - dama Ňč…Ēn Hagaara daa ny…õ la daabri, ka Gy…õrusal…õm wa niriba kur b…õ la daabtiri ni.

ref: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
text: Amaa arizana ni Gy…õrusal…õm la su ka maŇčŇča; ti ma maa nla.

ref: The Scriptures say about her, ‚ÄúYou have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.‚ÄĚ
text: Dama Litaafi y…õliya, ni#:- ‚ÄúNyin p…Ē'akund…Ē'ara wa, Na kur mari sufupeelim! Kaasima ka tasiri ni sufumaasim, Nyin Ňč…Ēn na zi n‚ÄĎnya bid…Ē'am beerim! P…Ē'aziiliŇčŇča nin ti mari biisi pam n‚ÄĎgaari p…Ē'as…Ē Ňč…Ēn b…õ doo yiri.‚ÄĚ

ref: My friends, you were born because of this promise, just as Isaac was.
text: Yarim muna, m mabiisi - ya yi ny…õ la Naawunni biisi nangbambasiri basibu zugu, kaman Yisahaaku gba Ňč…Ēn daa ny…õ Ibrahim biiya seem la.

ref: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.

ref: The Scriptures say, ‚ÄúGet rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.‚ÄĚ
text: Amaa wula ka Litaafi y…õtta? - Ka y…õliya, ni, ‚ÄúKarim p…Ē'adaabri maa ni u bii la m‚ÄĎbasi kpaŇčŇča; dama p…Ē'adaabri bii maa bu ti y…õ la'am birikyimp…Ē'a bii maa saani n‚ÄĎdi ba ba maa faari.‚ÄĚ

ref: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.

ref: I, Paul, promise you that Christ won't do you any good if you get circumcised.
text: Ya wumma! Man P…Ēla n y…õtti ya wa, ni, ya yi sakki ka ky…õ ka ba guni ya, dinŇč…Ēna Kirisita ka bukyi n‚ÄĎti ya halli beela.

ref: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.

ref: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.

ref: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.

text: Di siri pa Naawunni Ňč…Ēn daa booli ya la n‚ÄĎta'ai ya lala!

ref: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
text: Ni, ‚ÄúDi kur ny…õ la dabina beela k…Ēk…Ē zugu ka boroboro pitta.‚ÄĚ

Dama man yi siri moonni lala, Yisa kum d…Ēpulli y…õla ku laa m‚ÄĎb…õ n saani ni ba ti yaai ma di zugu.
