ref: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
text: M mabiisi, yarima Ňč…Ēna - ba daa booli ya y…Ēlisimma zii na, ka mugsigu zaa ka ya saani. Amaa yan di ky…õ ka mugsigu kaalinsi din b…õ ya saani wa leebi soori n‚ÄĎti ya, ka ningbina ni k…Ēribeeri ti deaai ya beebu zaasa. Amaa ya lee n‚ÄĎky…õ ka di ny…õ la wurilim zugu ka ya tumni n‚ÄĎtiri taaba.

ref: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
text: Dama fukumsi zaaligudima maa la'am n‚ÄĎniŇči zaalikpanni yinni, ni#:- ‚ÄúWuri i taraana hoo nyin wuri i mammaŇčŇča seem la.‚ÄĚ

ref: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
text: Amaa ya b…õ ni hoo mooni bunk…Ēbri, ka dumni taaba m‚ÄĎpaari taaba dansi; ya baŇčŇčma, miri ka ya ti sa'am taaba n‚ÄĎnaai zaa zaa.

ref: If you are guided by the Spirit, you won't obey your selfish desires.
text: Man Ňč…Ēn y…õtti seem nŇč…Ēa#:- ya ky…õ ka Sii Kasi maa wulisiri ya ya beebu zaa soori, ka ya ku tum la ninsaala k…Ēribeeri boorimma tuma.

ref: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
text: Dama ninsaala k…Ēribeeri Ňč…Ēn za'asiri bunseela ka Siiya Kasi boora, ka Siiya Kasi mun Ňč…Ēn bu boori bunseelli la ka k…Ērisi gba boora. S…Ēya ayi wa mari taaba dimni, ka dinŇč…Ē wulisiya, ni, ya ku toaai n‚ÄĎniŇči yan boori seem.

ref: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
text: Ka ya mun yi d…Ēli la Sii Kasi maa wulisigu la, dinŇč…Ēna ya ku laa m‚ÄĎb…õ fukumsi zaaligudima maa suulinsi ni.

ref: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
text: Ninsaala k…Ērisi tuma Ňč…Ēn b…õ seem kur yi paalu ni. Zina da'ari tuma n ny…õ a, ni ky…Ē'ansi beebu, ni ban bu mari ba mansi suŇčŇča tuma zaa:

ref: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
text: m‚ÄĎpaasi buga gyeeŇčŇču, ni soo, ni tiima tuma. Niriba leebri la dindaandima ka zabri taaba; ba zabri zinyuu, ka ky…õ ka ba suuri yisigra, ka mari tumbeeri teesa ni ba ti duusi ba mansi. Ba laa m‚ÄĎboori w…Ēliginsim.

ref: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
text: Halli ba zabri nyuuri; ka laa n‚ÄĎnyuuri daam m‚ÄĎbugra; ka tumni tunky…Ē'ama, ni tumbeeri wa taabu baligu kam zaa. N y…õtti ya ni, kaman man daa pun daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎy…õli ya seem la: ni, ban kam zaa b…õ anŇč…Ē taataabu beesigu maa ni ku ti di Naawunni naam faari.

ref: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
text: Niriba sigsiri ba mansi, ka mari ba mansi suŇčŇča. Zaalis…õseaa ka ni n‚ÄĎgalimni y…õla wa taataabu.

ref: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
text: Ka ban kam zaa ny…õ la Kirisita Yisa dina pun zaŇčŇči ninsaatiri teesa n‚ÄĎkpaasi n‚ÄĎtabli d…Ēpulli zugu n‚ÄĎku - ana ni k…Ēribeeri boorimma zaa.

ref: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
text: Siiya Vuusim Kasi maa tiri ti la ny…Ēvuri; see ka u laa n‚ÄĎsu ti ny…Ēvuya maa s…Ēya zaa gba.

ref: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
text: Faasee ka ti ky…õ ti karimbaani m‚ÄĎbasi; ka ti di laa n‚ÄĎyisigri taaba sufu, n‚ÄĎzabri nyuuri ni taaba m‚ÄĎpaasi.

ref: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
text: M mabiisi, s…Ē yi tumni taalli ka ya baŇčŇči lala, see ka yarima ban mari Siiya Kasi maa nin zaŇčŇči u n‚ÄĎzaali n‚ÄĎwulisi u din tu; amaa faasee ka ya niŇči lala maa baalimm baalimm. Nyin g…Ēsim i mammaŇčŇča suŇčŇča, din nin ky…õ ka nyin gba di kp…õ zamsigu puuni.

ref: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
text: Ya suŇčŇčma n‚ÄĎzi taaba zitibsa, ka ya yi tumni lala, ya nin d…Ēlisi Kirisita Masiiya zaaligudima zaa.

ref: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
text: S…Ē yi teesi, ni, u ny…õ la bunseelli ka mun siri pa bunseelli, di daama kur y…Ēmsiri la u mammaŇčŇča.

ref: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.

ref: We each must carry our own load.
text: Dama s…Ēkam zaa ziiri la u mammantoori ziiri.

ref: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.

ref: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
text: Yan di y…Ēmsiri ya mammansi, ka Naawunni pa la ban niŇčni s…Ē ansarisi; ka nira yi buri bunseela, ana ka u nin ti ky…õa.

ref: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
text: S…Ē yi buri ningbina k…Ērisi beesigu bumbura, u nin ti nya sa'aŇčŇču antaam di zugu; u mun yi buri la Siiya Kasi bumbura, lala nin ky…õ ka u ti nya ny…Ēvuriseaa kan ka naari.

ref: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
text: Dizugu ti di ky…õ ka ti gy…õ tunsuma tumpu zugu; ka ti yi bu ky…õ tuma maa m‚ÄĎbasi, saha ky…õnni na ka ti nin nya ti antaam.

ref: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
text: Ka dinzugu, soori Ňč…Ēn kur yoaai n‚ÄĎti ti maa zugu, faasee ka ti tumni suŇčŇča n‚ÄĎtiri s…Ēkam zaa, ka di mun di tam la ti yiri dima maa ban ny…õ y…õdda niŇčniba la.

ref: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
text: Kur g…Ēsima man Ňč…Ēn zaŇčŇči n mammaŇčŇča nuu n‚ÄĎs…Ēbri bakyi k…Ēbkarakara seem n‚ÄĎti ya na#:-

ref: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
text: Ninvugseeba ban kur mugsiri ya ya gunibu zugu maa n ny…õ ban kur boori ni ba wulisi ba mansi ka nyu kafuga zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ningbina y…õla. Ban niŇči seem gbinni kur ny…õ la, ni, din nin ky…õ ka niriba ku namsi ba Kirisita d…Ēpulli maa zugu.

ref: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
text: Halli ninvugseeba ban guni maa bu wumni n‚ÄĎtiri fukumsi zaaligudima maa; ba boori la ya guni ka ba yi nyu bara, ni, ya daa wum n‚ÄĎti ba zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ningbina y…õtt…Ē'a wa y…õla.

ref: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
text: Amaa man Ňč…Ēna, m bu boori n nyu la bara bunseelli kam zugu, di yi pa la ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya d…Ēpulli la zugu k…Ēk…Ēa. U d…Ēpulli wa zugu ka duniya wa ny…õ la bunkpiiŇčŇču n‚ÄĎti ma, ka man gba ny…õ bunkpiiŇčŇču n‚ÄĎti duniya.

Ya kur yuumni Litaafi yuuma n‚ÄĎwulisira, ni wungyeeŇčŇču yuuma, ni Sii Kasi yuuma gba; ya yuumni ya sufu ni m‚ÄĎpuusiri Naawunni sahakam.

text: Tin boori ya y…õla pam zugu n ky…õ ka ti daa l…Ē, ni, ti purigi tin mari seelli n‚ÄĎti ya. Pa Naawunni lahabasuŇčŇču la k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎtabli ti mammaŇčŇča ny…Ēvuya gba, ka di ny…õ la tin kur wuri ya maa zugu.

ref: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
text: Ti mabiisi, ya teaama tin daa tumni seem la y…õla, halli ni ti yaa t…Ēriga, ni tin daa di wahala seem la. Ti daa kur tumni la wuntaŇčŇča ni yuŇčŇču, ni di ky…õ ka ti y…õla ku mugsi ya, ka ti toaai n‚ÄĎyiisi lahabasuŇčŇču kan yi Naawunni saani la n‚ÄĎti ya na.

ref: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
text: Ya ny…õ la ti s…õharadima, ka Naawunni gba di ti s…õhara m‚ÄĎpaasi, ti beesigu Ňč…Ēn daa b…õ seem n‚ÄĎtiri ya y…õddaniŇčniba wa: ni, ti daa d…Ēli y…õlimaŇčni soori ka tumni din tuusi, ka galinsi ka ni.

ref: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
text: Ya mi halli tin daa tumni seem n‚ÄĎtiri ya maa, ni, di daa Ňčmanni hoo d…Ēs…Ē Ňč…Ēn niŇčni u mammaŇčŇča bii seem la.

ref: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
text: Ti daa kpaam ya, ka kpamsi ya, ka zaali ya noori, ni, ya mari beesiseelli din ky…õ ka Naawunni nini tigra, dama u boonni ya ni, ni yan ni Ňä…Ēn ti la'am u naam puuni n‚ÄĎnya u gyirima.

ref: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
text: DinŇč…Ē zugu ka ti p…õ'ari Naawunni saha kam. Tin daa zaŇčŇči Naawunni y…õligu na n‚ÄĎti ya la, ya daa deaai y…õligu maa. Ya daa bu deaai ka hoo ninsaala y…õligu, amaa hoo Naawunni dinni; ka di siri ny…õ la lala, ka kur tumni ka tuma ya saani - yarima ban ny…õ y…õddaniŇčniba wa.

ref: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
text: Ti mabiisi, ya daa nya wahala hoo Naawunni niriba ban b…õ Gyuudiiya tingbaŇčŇču ni la Ňč…Ēn daa nya seem la - niriba ban ny…õ Yisa Masiiya Ňč…Ēn su seeba la. Ya daa nya wahala ya mammaŇčŇča timbiisi saani, hoo ban gba Ňč…Ēn daa nya wahala ba Izra…õli taaba saani seem la.

ref: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
text: Ban Izra…õli dima n daa zaŇčŇči ti Dugma Yisa n‚ÄĎku u, ni anabidima gba, ka daa kari ti n‚ÄĎyiisi. Ba kur tumni la din ky…õ ka Naawunni nini bu tigra, ka kur Ňčmeeri nangbankpeemni ninsaalidima zaa saani.

ref: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
text: Halli ba daa kpaŇčŇči ba maŇčŇča ni ba ta'ai ti ka ti ku toaai m‚ÄĎmooli tuliginsim lahabaari n‚ÄĎti ban pa Izra…õli dima maa. Ba pun tum tumbeeri pam, ka ba ala'akyi tuma wa paasiri tumbeeri anla zugu, ka a paari a t…Ēriga. Ka Naawunni sufuyisigri naayi paai ba n‚ÄĎnaai.

ref: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
text: Ti mabiisi, tin daa w…Ēligi ka ky…õ ya daba ayi la puuni - kulla ti ningbina taaba w…Ēligri ka n y…õtti wa, pa ti sufu ni teesa w…Ēligri. Ti sufu zaa daa b…õ la ya nyaabu ni, ni ti teesa zaa, ni ti ba'aba zaa.

ref: You alone are our glory and joy!
text: Y…õlimaŇčni yarima zugu ka ti siri nya ti gyirima ni ti sufupeelli.

ref: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
text: Dinzugu tin daa nya ka ti ku toaai n‚ÄĎlaa n‚ÄĎguusi yaasa, ti daa sakki ni ti k…Ēk…Ē kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ Ateensi tiŇčŇča

ref: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
text: ka tum ti mabii Tim…Ēti ya saani na, dama u ny…õ la Naawunni tuntumna, ka tin ni Ňč…Ēna la'am n‚ÄĎtumni Kirisita lahabasuŇčŇču mooligu tuma la. Ňä…Ēna ka ti daa tum ya saani, ni u ti kpaam ya, ka kpamsi ya y…õdda.

ref: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
text: Ni, lala ti ky…õ ka s…Ē ku y…Ēmsi ya n‚ÄĎlabsi ya nyaaŇčŇča, wahala wa nyaabu zugu. Ya mammaŇčŇča mi halli, ni, di ny…õ la Naawunni yuubu, ni, ti nya wahala wa tataabu.

ref: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
text: Tin daa na b…õ ya saani la, ti daa pun daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎy…õli ya, ni, ti nin nya wahala; ka ya zaa mi, ni, lala n daa siri niŇči.

ref: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
text: Dinzugu man daa nya ka n ku toaai n‚ÄĎlaa n‚ÄĎguusi m‚ÄĎpaasi zugu ka n daa tum Tim…Ēti ya saani na, ni di ky…õ ka n baŇčŇči ya y…õdda Ňč…Ēn ny…õ seem. Dama n kur teesiri, ni, di pa seem ka Sintaani nya s…Ēseaa ni u ti y…Ēmsi ya, ka lala zugu nin ky…õ ka ti tuma la kpalim y…Ēri.

ref: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
text: Tim…Ēti mun Ňč…Ēn daa labi na, u daa y…õli ti ya y…õdda ni ya wurilim Ňč…Ēn ny…õ seem. U y…õli ti, ni, ya na kur teesiri ti y…õla, ka boori ni ya nya ti, hoo ti gba sufu Ňč…Ēn boori ya nyaabu seem.

ref: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
text: Dizugu, ti mabiisi, ti namsigu ni ti wahala diibu puuni, ti nyari kpamsigu ya zugu. Ya y…õdda niŇčbu n kpamsiri ti

ref: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
text: dama ya yi ti bari n‚ÄĎzaani ya beebu ni, ti Dugma zugu, di nin ky…õ ka ti leebi ban vu.

ref: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
text: Ti susiri Naawunni Ňč…Ēn nya ti Ba la, ni ti Dugma Yisa, ni, u maalima soori n‚ÄĎti ti, ka ti ky…õ ya saani na.

ref: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
text: Ti laa n‚ÄĎsusiri ti Dugma, ni, u ky…õ ka ya wuri taaba, halli n‚ÄĎwuri niriba zaa; ka ya wurilim zoaai m‚ÄĎpaasiri sahakam hoo tin gba Ňč…Ēn wuri ya seem la.

ref: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
text: Ka dinŇč…Ēna u nin kpamsi ya, ka ky…õ ka ya bari n‚ÄĎzaani, ni ya ti b…õ kasi ka ka taalli ti Ba Naawunni saani. Ka di nin ti ny…õ la lala, sahanseaa ti Dugma Yisa Ňč…Ēn ti ya labi na la, ka u toori niriba zaa nin ti d…Ēli u na.

ref: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
text: Ti mabiisi, din paasi ny…õ la: ya teaama din sum ni ya b…õ seem n‚ÄĎtigi Naawunni nini. Ya pun bamsi lala ti saani, halli lala ka ya daa kur niŇčna; ka ti susiri ya ka kpaamni ya ti Dugma Yisa yuuri zugu, ni, ya kur niŇčma lala m‚ÄĎpaasira.

ref: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
text: Dama ya mi wulisigu seaa tin daa zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎwulisi ya, hoo ti Dugma Yisa Ňč…Ēn zaali ti seem la.

ref: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
text: Naawunni yuubu ya saani ny…õ la: ya maali n‚ÄĎleebi u niriba ka b…õ kasi, ka di tum zina.

ref: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
text: ka di pa la ya d…Ēli ningbiŇčŇču k…Ēri soori, hoo ban bu d…Ēli Naawunni zaaligu Ňč…Ēn tumni seem la.

ref: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
text: DinŇč…Ē zugu, s…Ē di tum u kpeaa din bu tuusi, bee, u fa u kpeaa. Ti Dugma nin ti darigi ban tumni din bu tuusi wa tuba, hoo tin daa pun kpaam ya seem la.

ref: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
text: Dizugu Ňč…Ēnkam za'asi wulisigu wa, pa ninsaala wulisigu ka u za'asi, amaa Naawunni Ňč…Ēn ti ti u Sii Kasi la wulisigu ka u za'asi.

ref: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
text: Di bu kpa talasi ni n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi n‚ÄĎwulisi ya yan nin wuri taaba seem, dama Naawunni pun wulisi ya yan nin wuri ya mabiisi seem, ka ya bamsi lala u saani suŇčŇča.

ref: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
text: Ka lala ka ya siri wuri ya mabiisi ban b…õ Masidoonya tingbaŇčŇču zaa; amaa, ti mabiisi, ti kpaamni ya, ni, ya kur niŇčma lala m‚ÄĎpaasira.

ref: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
text: Ya kpaŇčŇčma ya maŇčŇča m‚ÄĎb…õ baalimm, ka ky…õ ka ya teesa b…õ ya mammaŇčŇča y…õla ni, ka b…Ē ya mammaŇčŇča nuu tuma n‚ÄĎtumna, hoo tin daa pun wulisi ya seem la.

ref: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
text: Ya yi niŇčni dinŇč…Ēa, lala nin ky…õ ka ban b…õ kpaŇčŇča nin ti ya gyirima, ka ya mun ku p…Ēsigi bunseelli kam.

ref: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
text: Ti mabiisi, ti bu boori ni ya b…õ ziilinsi ni zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ninvugseeba ban gbisiri kum ni la y…õla, ka di nin ky…õ ka ya ku fabinna ban kpi la zugu hoo ban ka tama Ňč…Ēn niŇčni seem la.

ref: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
text: Dama ti yi niŇči y…õdda, ni, Yisa daa kpiya ka laa n‚ÄĎneaai yaasa, ti laa n‚ÄĎniŇči y…õdda, ni, Naawunni nin ti ky…õ ka Yisa ninvugseeba ban gbisiri kum ni la ti d…Ēli Yisa n‚ÄĎlabi na.

ref: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
text: Ti Dugma y…õligu Ňč…Ēn wulisi seem ka ti y…õtti ya maa: tiseeba ban ya n‚ÄĎkpalim m‚ÄĎmari ny…Ēvuri halli nti paai ti Dugma lappu na saha la muna - ti ku ti daŇčŇči ban pun gbisiri kum ni la tooni.

ref: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
text: Dama ba nin tasi pampam, ka niriba nin ti wum malaakadima zuguraana kuk…Ēri ni Naawunni kikaa kunkuma. Di saha ka ti Dugma mammaŇčŇča nin ti yi saazugu n‚ÄĎsigi na; ka Kirisita Masiiya ninvugseeba ban pun kpi la nin ti daŇčŇči kum ni neaari.

ref: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
text: Ka tiseeba ban kpalim m‚ÄĎmari ny…Ēvuri m‚ÄĎb…õ duniya wa ni - tin ni ban nin ti la'am n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči nti kp…õ sangbana ni, n‚ÄĎtuusi ti Dugma Yisa soori saazugu sa; lala ka ti nin ti kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ ti Dugma maa saani halli ni saha din ka t…Ēriga.

ref: Encourage each other with these words.
text: Dizugu ya zaŇčŇčma y…õtt…Ē'a wa m‚ÄĎmaari taaba sufu.

ref: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
text: Ti mabiisi, di bu laa n‚ÄĎkpa talasi ni ti laa n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi n‚ÄĎti ya zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči dabsa ni saha seelli din ti ya n‚ÄĎniŇči.

ref: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
text: Dama ya mammansi mi halli, ni, ti Dugma lappu na saha dabsiri maa nin ti ky…õ na hoo ta'ayiga Ňč…Ēn yi ky…õ na yuŇčŇču seem la.

ref: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
text: Ni, sahaseaa niriba yi ti y…õtti, ni, sufudoaa ni goom b…õ ni, di saha ka basiy…Ēri ya m‚ÄĎpaai ba na, ka ba ku toaai n‚ÄĎfa ba mansi m‚ÄĎbasi. Di nin ti piili katiŇčŇča, hoo p…Ē'a Ňč…Ēn yi wulisiri, ni, u d…Ē'ai ka beerim seelli mari u la.

ref: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
text: Amaa, ti mabiisi, ya pa la ninvugseeba ban b…õ zibsim ni ka dabsiri maa nin ti libgi ya hoo ta'ayiga Ňč…Ēn libgri niriba seem la.

ref: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
text: Ya ny…õ la neesim ni wuntaŇčŇča ni niriba. Ti pa la yuŇčŇču bee zibsim ni niriba.

ref: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
text: Dama yuŇčŇču ka g…Ēgbisiriba gbisira, ka danyuuriba mun nyuuri m‚ÄĎbugri la yuŇčŇču gba.

ref: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
text: Amaa tirima n ny…õ wuntaŇčŇča ni niriba: di zugu ya ky…õ ka ti mari ti maŇčŇča. Ya ky…õ ka ti zaŇčŇči y…õdda ni wurilim n‚ÄĎleebi ti ny…Ēta'arigu m‚ÄĎpa ti nyaari zugu, ka zaŇčŇči ti tuliginsim tama n‚ÄĎleebi t…Ēbtuusira kutti zupiliga la m‚ÄĎpili.

ref: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Naawunni daa bu maali ti ni u sufuyisigri tubdarigri ti paai ti na, amaa u zaali ti ni ti nya tuliginsim ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya zugu.

ref: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
text: Ňä…Ēna n daa kpi ti zugu, ni di ky…õ ka ti zaa ti la'am m‚ÄĎb…õ u saani, di yi ny…õ la ti b…õ la ti ny…Ēvuri ni, bee, ti kpi ni.

ref: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
text: DinŇč…Ē zugu ya kpamsima taaba sufu ka niŇčni din nin suŇčŇči ya taaba ka ba zoaai Naawunni d…Ēligu ni: halli ya siri pun niŇčni lala pampaŇčŇč…Ē gba.

ref: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
text: Ti mabiisi, ti susiri ya, ni, ya tim ya toondaandima maa gyirima - ban ny…õ ban tumni Naawunni tuma n‚ÄĎtiri ya, ka kpaamni ya suŇčŇča.

ref: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
text: Ya gyeemni ba ka tiri ba gyirima, ka laa n‚ÄĎwuri ba pam ban tumni seelli la zugu; ka mari nangbanyinni ni taaba.

ref: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
text: Ti mabiisi, ya kpaamni gbinnya'a dima. Ka ban sufu miligi la muna - ya maari ba sufu n‚ÄĎtiri ba: halli ya suŇčŇčma ban gbarigi la, ka mari sugru ni s…Ēkam zaa.

ref: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
text: S…Ē di boosiri u kpeaa beeri, amaa ya niŇčma nirilim n‚ÄĎtiri taaba - halli n‚ÄĎtiri s…Ēkam zaa.

ref: Always be joyful
text: Ya mari sufupeelli sahakam;

ref: and never stop praying.
text: ya susima Naawunni sahakam;

ref: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
text: ka p…õ'ari Naawunni seelikam zaa puuni. Dama lala ka Naawunni boori ni ya niŇčni ya beebu ni, Yisa Masiiya zugu.

ref: or ignore prophecies.
text: yan di zeem anabitiri y…õtt…Ē'a y…õla.

ref: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
text: Amaa ya bugsima bunseelikam m‚ÄĎbaŇčŇči di y…õlimaŇčni Ňč…Ēn ny…õ seem; ka mari din veela suŇčŇčasuŇčŇča;

ref: and don't have anything to do with evil.
text: ka naayi yi bunseelli kam din ny…õ bumbeoo ni.

ref: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
text: Naawunni n tiri sufudoaa: ky…õ ka u maali ya ka ya b…õ kasi zaa, ka mari ya siisi ni ya sufu ni ya ningbina ka a ku ti mari taalli ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita lappu na saha.

ref: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
text: Ňä…Ēn booli ya maa ny…õ la Ňč…Ēn nin niŇči di, dama y…õdda daana n ny…õ u, ka z…õ yummu.

ref: Friends, please pray for us.
text: Ti mabiisi, ya susima Naawunni n‚ÄĎtiri ti gba.

ref: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
text: Ya puusima ti mabiisi la zaa mabiitiri puusigu suŇčŇča n‚ÄĎti ti.

ref: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
text: Ya wumma yaa! Ti y…õtti ya ti Dugma zugu, ni, ya ky…õ ka ba karim gbaŇčŇču wa n‚ÄĎti ti mabiisi la zaa.

ref: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
text: Ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya piinisuma kpalim m‚ÄĎb…õ ya saani.

ref: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Man P…Ēla, ni Sailivanisi, ni Tim…Ēti n s…Ēbri gbaŇčŇču wa n‚ÄĎtiri ya T…õsal…Ēnika niriba ban la'amni n‚ÄĎgyeemni Yisa maa. Ya ny…õ ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya Ňč…Ēn su seeba la.

ref: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
text: Ti mabiisi, ti kur p…õ'ari Naawunni ya zugu, ka di sum ni lala, dama ya y…õdda kur zoaari m‚ÄĎpaasira, ka ya wurilim zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči ya taaba saani gba zoaari pam.

ref: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
text: Dinzugu ti kur nyuuri la bara n‚ÄĎy…õtti Naawunni niriba zaa n‚ÄĎwulisiri ba yan z…õ yummu seem, ni ya y…õdda niŇčbu y…õla, halli ni ya nyari namsigu ka diri wahala zaa.

ref: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
text: DinŇč…Ē n wulisi, ni, Naawunni sariya karibu tuusiya zaa, ni, ya ny…õ la ban sum ni Naawunni naam, halli ni ya diri wahala u naam la zugu.

ref: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
text: Naawunni nin niŇči din tuusi. U nin ky…õ ka ban namsiri ya la ti nya namsigu.

ref: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
text: Ka yarima muna, yan Ňč…Ēn nya namsigu la, u nin taasi y…Ēlisimma na nti ya, ka laa n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎti tirima gba. U nin niŇči lala ti Dugma Yisa ni u malaaka yiikodaandima Ňč…Ēn yi ti yi arizana ni na sahanseaa.

ref: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
text: U nin zaŇčŇči bugum din dira n‚ÄĎky…õ na, ni u ti darigi ban bu mi Naawunni maa tuba, ni ban za'asi ti Dugma Yisa lahabasuŇčŇču maa tuba gba.

ref: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
text: Ba nin ti y…Ē ba ba taalli samni m‚ÄĎbasi ba y…Ēri, saha kan ka naari; ka ba nin kpalim n‚ÄĎz…õ wa'aligu n‚ÄĎk…ĒŇčŇči ti Dugma gyirima ni u yiiko ni beebu maa.

ref: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
text: Ti Dugma Yisa nin labi na di daari maa, nti nya gyirima u niriba saani, ni tibgri ban pun niŇči u y…õdda saani. Ya gba nin ti b…õ niriba wa sunsukkuni, yan daa deaai lahabaseelli tin daa t…Ē'asi n‚ÄĎti ya la zugu.

ref: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.

text: Dama Adam ka Naawunni daa daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎnaam, ka naayi naam Hawa.

ref: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
text: Ka di pa la Adam ka Sintaani daa y…Ēmsi, amaa Hawa ka u daa y…Ēmsi ka u leebi Ňč…Ēn burigi Naawunni zaaligu.

ref: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
text: Amaa p…Ē'aba yi kur kpalim m‚ÄĎmari y…õdda, ni wurilim, ka b…õ kasi, ka mari ba mansi suŇčŇča, ba nin nya tuliginsim, biisi d…Ē'am puuni.

ref: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
text: Y…õtt…Ēkku wa ny…õ la y…õlimaŇčni. Ninvugs…Ē sufu yi boori nimmoaa, ni, u leebi Naawunni niriba toondaana, Ňč…Ēn boori seelli maa ny…õ la tunsuŇčŇču.

ref: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
text: Di bu sumni ni u ny…õ Ňč…Ēn nyuuri daam m‚ÄĎbugra, bee Ňč…Ēn ny…õ zabboora; amaa di sumni ni u ny…õ la Ňč…Ēn b…õ baalimm ka pa Ňč…Ēn Ňčmeeri nangbankpeemni, bee, Ňč…Ēn sufu wuri ligri nti yakki.

ref: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
text: Di kpa la talasi ni u ny…õ la Ňč…Ēn mari u maŇčtoori yiri suŇčŇča, ka u biisi deaari u noori ka tiri u gyirima bunseelli kam zaa ni.

ref: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
text: Dama nira yi bu nyaŇčŇči m‚ÄĎmari u toori yiri maa, u ya niŇči la wula n‚ÄĎtoaai m‚ÄĎmari Naawunni niriba maa n‚ÄĎg…Ēsiri ba y…õla?

ref: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
text: Di mun bu sum ni di daama ny…õ la Ňč…Ēn na yooli n‚ÄĎniŇči tuuba; di yi pa lala u nin nyu bara n‚ÄĎduusi u maŇčŇča ka lala zugu nin ky…õ ka ba kari u sariya n‚ÄĎlusi u, hoo Sintaani Ňč…Ēn daa lu seem la.

ref: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
text: Ka din paasi dinŇč…Ē zaa zugu ny…õ la, di kpa la talasi ni u ny…õ la s…Ē Ňč…Ēn yuuri du ban b…õ kpaŇčŇča saani: di yi pa lala, u nin ti tum vi tuma, ka Sintaani ky…õ'ariga gbaai u.

ref: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
text: Di laa n‚ÄĎkpa la talasi ni ba sufu ni teesa b…õ deede, ka ba deaai y…õtt…Ē'azulima an b…õ ti wulisigu puuni la m‚ÄĎmari suŇčŇča.

ref: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
text: Dizugu ya ky…õ ka ba ma'asi lala niriba p…Ēi, ka ba beesigu yi wulisi, ni, ba ka galinsi, yan naayi ky…õ ka ba tum toondaandima suŇčŇčniba tuma maa.

ref: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
text: Di sum ni Ňč…Ēn suŇčŇčni ya toondaandima maa mari la p…Ē'a yinni, ka nyaŇčŇči m‚ÄĎmari u biisi ni u yiri dima suŇčŇča.

ref: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
text: Ninvugseeba ban tumni tuma wa suŇčŇča nin nya yusuma, ka nyaŇčŇči m‚ÄĎmari sufukpeemni n‚ÄĎt…Ē'asira, ban niŇči Yisa Masiiya y…õdda seem la zugu.

ref: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
text: S…Ē ku toaai n‚ÄĎkyiisi, ni, ti Naawunni soori y…õlis…Ē'ara wa bu galisi. Dina n ny…õ, ni#:- ‚ÄúU daa leebi ninsaala n‚ÄĎyi paalu, Naawunni Sii Kasi mun daa z…õ u nyaaŇčŇča: Malaakadima gba daa nya u. Ba daa mooli u y…õla n‚ÄĎtiri bura kam zaa, Ka niriba daa niŇči u y…õdda duniya wa ni. Naawunni daa ti duusi u saazugu N‚ÄĎtaasi gyirima zaa ziiya arizana ni.‚ÄĚ

ref: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
text: Naawunni Sii maa daa pun wulisi ti n‚ÄĎy…õli, ni, sahanseesi an ti paari nyaaŇčŇča, ninvugseeba nin ti ky…õ ba y…õdda niŇčbu soori. Ni, ba nin ti d…Ēli siseeba ban y…Ēmsiri niriba, ni bunseesi arizimbeeri Ňč…Ēn wulisiri maa.

ref: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
text: Lala wulisigu maa yiiri la ninvugy…Ēmsiriba saani na, baseeba ban ny…õ ziri dima, ka ba sufu ni teesa bu laa n‚ÄĎteesiri bunsuma, hoo nira yi ti zaŇčŇči kurituulli n‚ÄĎvuuli u ningbina seem.

ref: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
text: Niriba wa taabu wulisigu y…õtti la, ni, di bu tuusi ka nira di p…Ē'a, bee, p…Ē'a kuli doowa. Ni, bundiriseesi kyisiri n‚ÄĎtiri niriba, ka ba di diri a. Amaa Naawunni mun daa naam bundira maa zaa n‚ÄĎtisi niriba, ni ba ti deaai m‚ÄĎpuusi u a zugu, dama ba laa n‚ÄĎniŇči u y…õdda ka baŇčŇči y…õlimaŇčni maa.

ref: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
text: Naawunni Ňč…Ēn naam bunseelli kam zaa veela. Ka di bu sum ni ti za'asiri a ni; amaa ti puusima Naawunni ka deaari a ni;

ref: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
text: dama Naawunni y…õligu ni wunsusigu nin ky…õ ka a b…õ kasi Naawunni saani.

ref: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
text: I yi zaŇčŇči y…õla wa zaa n‚ÄĎwulisiri ti mabiisi maa, i nin leebi Kirisita Yisa tuntunsuŇčŇču. Lala Ňčmanni la hoo nyin diisiri i mammaŇčŇča n‚ÄĎkpamsira; nyin Ňč…Ēn daa pun wum y…õlisuma zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči y…õdda soori, ka laa n‚ÄĎwum y…õlimaŇčni wulisigu ka d…Ēli ka.

ref: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
text: Amaa z…Ēma n‚ÄĎyi ka ky…õ lahabay…Ēya ni s…Ēlinseesi an bu sum ni Naawunni nyaand…Ēliba. Kur kpaŇčŇčma i maŇčŇča m‚ÄĎbamsi Naawunni soori d…Ēligu.

ref: As the saying goes, ‚ÄúExercise is good for your body, but religion helps you in every way. It promises life now and forever.‚ÄĚ These words are worthwhile and should not be forgotten.
text: Y…õtt…Ēkku wa ny…õ la y…õlimaŇčni, ka sum ni nira deaai ka zaa, ka niŇči ka y…õdda.

ref: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
text: DinŇč…Ēa zugu ka ti diri wahala ka tumni ni ti yaa t…Ēriga, dama ti zaŇčŇči ti tama zaa n‚ÄĎniŇči Naawunni Ny…Ēvuri Daana wa ni. Ňä…Ēn Naawunni n ny…õ s…Ēkam zaa tuligra, halli ni u tuligri ninvugseeba ban niŇči u y…õdda la zaa, halli nti yakki.

ref: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
text: ZaŇčŇčma anŇč…Ēa zaa n‚ÄĎwulisi ba, ka zaali ba, ni, ba d…Ēli a.

ref: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
text: Di ky…õ ka s…Ē zeemni i, nyin Ňč…Ēn bu kurigi zaa zugu. Amaa ky…õ ka i y…õtt…Ē'a wulisi y…õddaniŇčniba maa din sum ni ba b…õ seem - i y…õtt…Ē'a, ni i beebu, ni i wurilim, ni i y…õdda niŇčbu, ni i tuma kasikasi tumpu la zaa.

ref: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
text: Kur kpalimma n‚ÄĎkarimni Naawunni y…õligu maa n‚ÄĎtiri niriba ni nimbirimoaa, ka kpamsiri ba sufu, ka wulisiri ba, halli ni n ti ky…õ na.

ref: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
text: Di tam nyin daa deaai Naawunni piiniseelli la, see ka i ky…õ ka i ba'a b…õ ka ni: ni, ba daa t…Ē'asi anabitiri y…õtt…Ē'a zaŇčŇči n‚ÄĎkyaŇčŇči i y…õla, ka toondaandima daa zaŇčŇči ba nuusi m‚ÄĎpa i zugu ka i daa deaai ka.

ref: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
text: D…Ēli anŇč…Ē zaa ka zaŇčŇči i maŇčŇča n‚ÄĎtiri a. Dina nin ky…õ ka s…Ēkam nya ka baŇčŇči, ni, i tuma maa ky…õnni tooni.

ref: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
text: Kur mari i maŇčŇča n‚ÄĎg…Ēsi i beebu ni i wulisigu suŇčŇča. Kpalimma n‚ÄĎniŇčni anŇč…Ē dima, dama i yi niŇči lala i nin tuligi i maŇčŇča, ni ninvugseeba ban wumni i wulisigu maa gba.

ref: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
text: Di tasi ninvugkurigu n‚ÄĎnyikki u; amaa kpamsim u kaman i ba. Ka laa n‚ÄĎdeaai na'akyimbisi la hoo i tunz…Ēppa,

ref: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
text: ka ky…õ ka p…Ē'akura la leebi i madima, ka p…Ē'asara mun leebi i tunz…Ēp…Ē'aba, halli ka i d…Ēli s…ĒsuŇčŇču n‚ÄĎtiri ba.

ref: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
text: G…Ēsim puk…Ēya ban siri boori suŇčŇčsim la suŇčŇča.

ref: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
text: Amaa puk…Ēs…Ē yi mari biisi bee ya'ansi, nyin ky…õ ka ba baŇčŇči, ni, see ka ba daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎg…Ēsi ba toori yiri dima suŇčŇča. Ba yi niŇči lala ba nin labsi n‚ÄĎy…Ē sanseaa ba badima ni ba yaadima maa Ňč…Ēn daa tum tunseelli zaa n‚ÄĎti ba la. Lala n ky…õ ka Naawunni nini tigra.

ref: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
text: Amaa puk…Ēs…Ē Ňč…Ēn b…õ u k…Ēk…Ē ka ka suŇčŇčna ny…õ la Ňč…Ēn siri boori suŇčŇčsim. Lala pukoori maa zaŇčŇči la u tama zaa n‚ÄĎniŇči Naawunni nuusi ni, ka kur puusiri Naawunni n‚ÄĎsusiri u, yuŇčŇču ni wuntaŇčŇča zaa.

ref: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
text: Puk…Ēs…Ē mun Ňč…Ēn zaŇčŇči u maŇčŇča n‚ÄĎti u ningbink…Ērisi tuma la, Ňč…Ēna pun kpi ni halli ni Ňč…Ēn na n…õ maa zaa y…Ēri.

ref: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
text: Dizugu zaalima y…õla wa gba n‚ÄĎtiri niriba, ka ba yi ti d…Ēli a, s…Ēs…Ē ku galim ba.

ref: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
text: Ninvugs…Ē yi bu g…Ēsiri u d…Ē'ariba, halli m‚ÄĎbu g…Ēsiri u toori yiri dima gba, u kyiisiri la u y…õdda niŇčbu soori, halli ni ninvugs…Ē Ňč…Ēn pa Yisa nyaand…Ēla n ny…õ bunsuŇčŇču n‚ÄĎgaari u.

ref: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
text: Di zaŇčŇči puk…Ēs…Ē n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi u yuuri m‚ÄĎpaasi puk…Ēya ni, di yi pa la u pun paai u yuuma pisiyoobu, ka kuli doo yinni k…Ēk…Ēa.

ref: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
text: See ka s…Ēkam mi u tunsuma y…õla - tunsuma wa ny…õ la: u wulisi u biisi suŇčŇča, n‚ÄĎdeaari saamma, n‚ÄĎtumni n‚ÄĎtiri Yisa nyaand…Ēliba, n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇčni ban b…õ wahala ni, ka zaŇčŇči u maŇčŇča zaa n‚ÄĎtum la tunsuma balibu kam.

ref: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
text: Di bu laa n‚ÄĎsumni ni i zaŇčŇči puk…Ēya ban na bu kurigi la yuya n‚ÄĎs…Ēbi m‚ÄĎpaasi puk…Ēya maa ni. Dama ba k…Ērisi yi ti b…õ d…Ēppa kulibu ni, ba nin Ňčmaligi ka ky…õ Kirisita y…õla;

ref: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
text: Din paasi dinŇč…Ē zugu ny…õ la#:- ba bamsiri la gbinnya'ari s…Ēya, ka sa'amni la ba saha n‚ÄĎgyinni n‚ÄĎkpeeri yiya, ka laa n‚ÄĎzuuri niriba nyaansi, ka kpeeri ba y…õla ni y…Ēri, ka t…Ē'asiri y…õtt…Ē'aseesi an bu sumni ni ba t…Ē'asi.

ref: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
text: Dinzugu n kpamsiri puk…Ēya ban na bu kurigi la, ni, ba kulima d…Ēppa, n‚ÄĎd…Ē'ai biisi, n‚ÄĎg…Ēsiri ba toori yiya. DinŇč…Ē nin ky…õ ka ti dindaandima ku nya soori ni ba tuuri ti.

ref: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
text: Ka p…Ē'as…Ē Ňč…Ēn ny…õ Yisa nyaand…Ēla yi mari puk…Ēya u yiri puuni, Ňč…Ēn suŇčŇčma ba, ka di ky…õ ka mugsigu b…õ Yisa niriba zugu; lala nin ky…õ ka ba nin toaai n‚ÄĎsuŇčŇči puk…Ēseeba ban siri boori suŇčŇčsim la.

ref: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
text: Kpamseeba ban tumni toondaana tuma suŇčŇča sumni la ba nya yoori buyi, ka di siri b…õ la lala n‚ÄĎtiri ban tumni suŇčŇča n‚ÄĎyiisiri wa'azu ka wulisiri Naawunni y…õligu.

ref: It is just as the Scriptures say, ‚ÄúDon't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.‚ÄĚ You also know the saying, ‚ÄúWorkers are worth their pay.‚ÄĚ
text: Dama Naawunni y…õligu y…õliya, ni, ‚ÄúDi l…Ē na'akoorigu noori, u yi tumni puu tuma sahanseaa.‚ÄĚ Ni, ‚ÄúTuntumna zaa sumni u deaai u tuma yoori.‚ÄĚ

ref: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
text: S…Ē yi galim toondaans…Ē i saani, nyin di deaai y…õtt…Ē'a maa, na'ala niriba ayi bee babata n la'am n‚ÄĎdi di s…õhara.

ref: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
text: Kpaasima ban tumni ala'akyi la zugri paalu ni, ka lala nin ky…õ ka dabeem gbaai ban kpalim la.

ref: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
text: N t…Ē'asiri wa ni Naawunni ti wumna, ni Yisa Masiiya, ni malaaka seeba Ňč…Ēn gamsi maa m‚ÄĎpaasi. N ya zaali i, ni, i d…Ēli wulisigu wa ka di daŇčŇči n‚ÄĎy…õli, ni, ninvugs…Ē galimiya p…Ēi, ka naayi wum u y…õtt…Ē'a; bee, n‚ÄĎgaŇčŇči s…Ē n‚ÄĎwuri, ka ky…õ s…Ēa.

ref: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
text: Di boori yooma ni i zaŇčŇči i nuusi m‚ÄĎpa s…Ē zugu ni u tum Naawunni tuma. I mun di ky…õ ka i nuu b…õ i taaba tumbeeri tumpu ni. Kur mari i maŇčŇča m‚ÄĎb…õ kasi.

ref: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
text: I puu Ňč…Ēn beera, ka i ningbina bu tigi alaaf…õ sahaseesi la zugu, di laa n‚ÄĎnyuuri koom k…Ēk…Ēa, amaa nyuuma daam beela m‚ÄĎpaasira.

ref: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
text: Ninvugseeba tumbeeri yi yi paalu n‚ÄĎdaŇčŇči ba tooni m‚ÄĎpaai sariya karibu ziiya; amaa seeba mun dina d…Ēli la ba nyaaŇčŇča.

ref: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
text: Lala ka tunsuma gba yiiri paalu ni, ka halli tunsunseaa yi b…õ ni kan bu yi paalu yooma, ka mun kur ku naayi n‚ÄĎkpalim n‚ÄĎs…Ē'ai.

ref: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
text: Di kpa la talasi ka ninvugseeba ban ny…õ daaba la tisiri ba duniya wa dugmadima gyirima, lala ka ya ku ky…õ ka s…Ē t…Ē'asiri y…õtt…Ē'aseaa din b…õ n‚ÄĎsa'amni Naawunni yuuri, bee, ti wulisigu wa yuuri.

ref: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
text: Halli daaba ban duniya wa dugmadima Ňč…Ēn ny…õ y…õddaniŇčniba maa gba - di sum ni ba tiri ba lala gyirima; ba di zeemni ba, ban ny…õ mabiisi ni taaba zugu. Ay! see ka ba tumni n‚ÄĎtiri ba halli n‚ÄĎgaari ban dugmadima pa y…õddaniŇčniba maa Ňč…Ēn gyeemni ba seem la; dama ban diri ba tuma maa anfaani ny…õ la y…õddaniŇčniba ban wuri seeba. Wulisima ba ka kpamsi ba ka ba niŇčni anŇč…Ē dima zaa.

ref: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
text: Ka Ňč…Ēnkam wulisiri wulisigu din b…õ di k…Ēk…Ēa, ka bu d…Ēli ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita y…õligu din mari alaaf…õ la, bee, Naawunni soori wulisigu tin d…Ēli seaa la,

ref: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
text: di daama ny…õ la karimbaani daana ka na zi bunseela. U naa n‚ÄĎny…õ la k…Ēribeeri daana Ňč…Ēn sufu kur b…õ la nangbankpeemni Ňčmeebu ni, ni zabky…Ē'ama zappu zugu. DinŇč…Ē taasiri la nyuuri zappu na, ni taaba nyaanzum, ni w…Ēligri, ni zulisigu.

ref: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
text: Niriba wa taabu teesa sa'amiya zaa, ka ba daamni la taaba dizugu; ba k…ĒŇčŇčni la y…õlimaŇčni zaa gba, ka teesiri, ni, Naawunni soori zugu nin ky…õ ka ba nya arizikki n‚ÄĎniŇči bundaandima.

ref: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
text: T…Ē: Naawunni soori siri ny…õ la arizikki titaari n‚ÄĎtiri ninvugs…Ē Ňč…Ēn nini tigi Ňč…Ēn mari seela.

ref: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
text: Dama ti daa bu zi bunseelli n‚ÄĎky…õ duniya wa ni na; ti mun ku laa n‚ÄĎzi bunseelli n‚ÄĎlabi.

ref: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
text: Ka ti yi mari bundirigu ni sutura, dinŇč…Ēna di sakkiya n‚ÄĎti ti.

ref: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
text: Ninvugseeba ban sufu kur boori ni ba leebi bundaandima maa pun zaŇčŇči ba mansi n‚ÄĎkpeesi zamsigu ni, hoo ky…õ'ariga ni. Ba laa n‚ÄĎzaŇčŇčni ba mansi n‚ÄĎkpeesiri la gy…õrilim ni, ni k…Ēriseesi an lusiri daadam ka basiri ba y…Ēri.

ref: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
text: Dama ligri boobu ny…õ la bumbeeri kam zaa nya'ari. Ka ninvugseeba ban sufu daa kur b…õ ligri nyaabu zugu daa burigiya ni, ka ky…õ ba y…õdda halli nti zaŇčŇči sufusa'aŇčŇču pam n‚ÄĎkusi ba mansi hoo piima la.

ref: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
